PMID: 28622514, 文献标题: Landscape of Infiltrating T Cells in Liver Cancer Revealed by Single-Cell Sequencing, 期刊: Cell, 研究年份: 2017. 物种: Human, 组织类型: Liver/Liver. 主要癌症类型: Hepatocellular Carcinoma, 详细癌症类型: Hepatocelluar carcinoma. 细胞大类: T cell, 细胞小类: T cell, 具体细胞名称: tumor-infiltrating Tregs. 关键细胞标志物: FOXP3, CTLA4, TNFRSF18, TNFRSF4, CCR8. 表型类型: clinical phenotype, 主要表型标签: Survival, 具体表型结果: worse overall survival, 如何影响表型: . 发现技术: N/A. 研究模型/样本: clinical samples. 验证技术类型: reduced disease-free survival rate. 证据级别: clinical data. 核心证据描述: "In addition, by interrogating the TCGA HCC survival data with respect to LAYN expression after normalizing the effect of T cell infiltration levels by total CD3 expression, we found that higher expression of LAYN was associated with reduced disease-free survival rate (p = 0.002, log rank test, Figure 4B)."

PMID: 29942092, 文献标题: Single-cell profiling of breast cancer T cells reveals a tissue-resident memory subset associated with improved prognosis, 期刊: Nature Medicine, 研究年份: 2018. 物种: Human, 组织类型: Breast/Breast. 主要癌症类型: Breast cancer, 详细癌症类型: Breast carcinoma. 细胞大类: T cell, 细胞小类: T cells, 具体细胞名称: CD8+CD103+ TRM cell. 关键细胞标志物: ITGAE, HAVCR2, PDCD1, CTLA4, TIGIT, LAG3, GZMB, PRF1. 表型类型: clinical phenotype, 主要表型标签: Survival, 具体表型结果: improved relapse-free and overall survival, 如何影响表型: . 发现技术: N/A. 研究模型/样本: clinical samples. 验证技术类型: survival analysis. 证据级别: clinical data. 核心证据描述: "Using available gene expression data from the ‘METABRIC’ consortium, we found that the TRM signature was significantly associated with improved relapse-free and overall sur vival in 329 primary TNBCs after standard chemotherapy (Fig. 4). "

实体类型: 细胞表型. PMID: 30181541, 文献标题: Unravelling subclonal heterogeneity and aggressive disease states in TNBC through single-cell RNA-seq, 期刊: Nature Communications, 研究年份: 2018. 物种: Human, 组织类型: Breast/Breast. 主要癌症类型: Breast cancer, 详细癌症类型: Breast carcinoma. 细胞大类: Epithelial cell, 细胞小类: epithelial cell, 具体细胞名称: luminal progenitor (LP) cells. 关键细胞标志物: KRT8, KRT1. 表型类型: clinical phenotype, 主要表型标签: Survival, 具体表型结果: shortened overall survival, 如何影响表型: . 发现技术: N/A. 研究模型/样本: clinical samples. 验证技术类型: survival analysis. 证据级别: clinical data. 核心证据描述: "We observed a statistically significant association between tumors with high expression of the cluster 2 signature and shortened overall survival (Fig. 4c)."

PMID: 30514914, 文献标题: Spatially and functionally distinct subclasses of breast cancer-associated fibroblasts revealed by single cell RNA sequencing, 期刊: Nature Communications, 研究年份: 2018. 物种: Human, 组织类型: Breast/Breast. 主要癌症类型: Breast cancer, 详细癌症类型: Breast carcinoma. 细胞大类: Fibroblast, 细胞小类: Fibroblast, 具体细胞名称: developmental CAFs (dCAFs). 关键细胞标志物: Scrg1, Sox9, Sox10, Col9a3, Chad, Mia, Spint2. 表型类型: biological phenotype, 主要表型标签: Others, 具体表型结果: existence, 如何影响表型: . 发现技术: N/A. 研究模型/样本: mice. 验证技术类型: Immunostaining. 证据级别: protein. 核心证据描述: "Interestingly, dCAFs were intermingled with the malignant epithelium during early stages of tumor development, whereas SCRG1-positive cells could be found both within the epithelium and in stromal streaks of late-stage tumors (Fig. 4b)."

实体类型: 细胞表型. PMID: 30514914, 文献标题: Spatially and functionally distinct subclasses of breast cancer-associated fibroblasts revealed by single cell RNA sequencing, 期刊: Nature Communications, 研究年份: 2018. 物种: Human, 组织类型: Breast/Breast. 主要癌症类型: Breast cancer, 详细癌症类型: Breast carcinoma. 细胞大类: Fibroblast, 细胞小类: Fibroblast, 具体细胞名称: developmental CAFs (dCAFs). 关键细胞标志物: Scrg1, Sox9, Sox10, Col9a3, Chad, Mia, Spint2. 表型类型: biological phenotype, 主要表型标签: Others, 具体表型结果: origination, 如何影响表型: . 发现技术: N/A. 研究模型/样本: mice. 验证技术类型: RNAscope in situ hybridization (RNA-ISH). 证据级别: RNA. 核心证据描述: "We next used RNA-ISH in order to detect dCAF-specific transcripts in tumor tissue with a variety of markers (Supple mentary Figure 5a,b). Taken together, the overlapping expression of dCAF SDE genes in both tumor epithelium and in stromal mesenchymal cells suggests that dCAFs may originate from tumor cells that have undergone an epithelial to-mesenchymal transition (EMT)."

实体类型: 细胞表型. PMID: 30514914, 文献标题: Spatially and functionally distinct subclasses of breast cancer-associated fibroblasts revealed by single cell RNA sequencing, 期刊: Nature Communications, 研究年份: 2018. 物种: Human, 组织类型: Breast/Breast. 主要癌症类型: Breast cancer, 详细癌症类型: Breast carcinoma. 细胞大类: Fibroblast, 细胞小类: Fibroblast, 具体细胞名称: matrix CAFs (mCAFs). 关键细胞标志物: CXCL14, Dcn, Lum, Vcan, Col14a1, Fbln1, Fbln2, and Smoc, Lox, Loxl1. 表型类型: biological phenotype, 主要表型标签: Tumor Growth, 具体表型结果: decreased during tumor progression, 如何影响表型: . 发现技术: N/A. 研究模型/样本: mice. 验证技术类型: Immunostaining. 证据级别: protein. 核心证据描述: "In contrast to vCAFs, the relative number of mCAFs decreased during tumor progression in the MMTV-PyMT mouse model (Fig. 3c)."

实体类型: 细胞表型. PMID: 30514914, 文献标题: Spatially and functionally distinct subclasses of breast cancer-associated fibroblasts revealed by single cell RNA sequencing, 期刊: Nature Communications, 研究年份: 2018. 物种: Human, 组织类型: Breast/Breast. 主要癌症类型: Breast cancer, 详细癌症类型: Breast carcinoma. 细胞大类: Fibroblast, 细胞小类: Fibroblast, 具体细胞名称: matrix CAFs (mCAFs). 关键细胞标志物: CXCL14, Dcn, Lum, Vcan, Col14a1, Fbln1, Fbln2, and Smoc, Lox, Loxl1. 表型类型: biological phenotype, 主要表型标签: Others, 具体表型结果: existence, 如何影响表型: . 发现技术: N/A. 研究模型/样本: mice. 验证技术类型: Immunohistochemistry (IHC) staining. 证据级别: protein. 核心证据描述: "Immunostaining of the mCAF markers Fibulin-1 and PDGFRα showed high prevalence of positive cells at the invasive front of tumors, in contrast to the relatively low abundance of mCAFs in the tumor core (Fig. 3f). The two mCAF markers Fibulin-1 and PDGFRα identified a profuse infiltration of mCAFs in the tumor stroma of human breast cancer tissue (Fig. 3g, h and Supplementary Figure 4d,f)."

实体类型: 细胞表型. PMID: 30514914, 文献标题: Spatially and functionally distinct subclasses of breast cancer-associated fibroblasts revealed by single cell RNA sequencing, 期刊: Nature Communications, 研究年份: 2018. 物种: Human, 组织类型: Breast/Breast. 主要癌症类型: Breast cancer, 详细癌症类型: Breast carcinoma. 细胞大类: Fibroblast, 细胞小类: Fibroblast, 具体细胞名称: vCAFs and mCAFs. 关键细胞标志物: Mcam, Notch3, Epas1, Col18a1, Nr2f2

CXCL14, Dcn, Lum, Vcan, Col14a1, Fbln1, Fbln2, and Smoc, Lox, Loxl1. 表型类型: clinical phenotype, 主要表型标签: Tumor Metastasis, 具体表型结果: increased risk for metastatic, 如何影响表型: . 发现技术: N/A. 研究模型/样本: clinical samples. 验证技术类型: survival analysis. 证据级别: clinical data. 核心证据描述: "In strong support of the notion of CAFs as modifiers of the malignant phenotype, the vCAF gene signature was found to be an independent prognostic indicator associated with an increased risk for developing metastatic disease in both univariable and multivariable analysis in a conditional logistic regression model involving common risk factors such as lymph node status, tumor size, HER2 status, and proliferative index (Table 1). Similarly, mCAFs were also associated with risk of disseminated disease, albeit to a lesser degree (Table 1)."

实体类型: 细胞表型. PMID: 30514914, 文献标题: Spatially and functionally distinct subclasses of breast cancer-associated fibroblasts revealed by single cell RNA sequencing, 期刊: Nature Communications, 研究年份: 2018. 物种: Human, 组织类型: Breast/Breast. 主要癌症类型: Breast cancer, 详细癌症类型: Breast carcinoma. 细胞大类: Fibroblast, 细胞小类: Fibroblast, 具体细胞名称: vCAFs and mCAFs. 关键细胞标志物: Mcam, Notch3, Epas1, Col18a1, Nr2f2

CXCL14, Dcn, Lum, Vcan, Col14a1, Fbln1, Fbln2, and Smoc, Lox, Loxl1. 表型类型: biological phenotype, 主要表型标签: Tumor Metastasis, 具体表型结果: migration, 如何影响表型: . 发现技术: N/A. 研究模型/样本: mice. 验证技术类型: Transwell invasion assay. 证据级别: protein. 核心证据描述: "Finally, to obtain an experimental correlate of the invasion-promoting effects of vCAFs and mCAFs suggested by our analysis, we seeded PeRo-Bas1 breast cancer cells isolated from MMTV-PyMT mice in the upper chamber of a trans-well system. In support of our previous findings in human tumors, both vCAFs and mCAFs significantly augmented the number of cancer cells that invaded through the matrix into the lower chamber, compared to cell culture medium alone (Fig. 5j)."

PMID: 31610266, 文献标题: Single-cell transcriptome analysis reveals tumor immune microenvironment heterogenicity and granulocytes enrichment in colorectal cancer liver metastases, 期刊: Cancer letters, 研究年份: 2020. 物种: Human, 组织类型: Gut/Colorectum. 主要癌症类型: Colorectal cancer, 详细癌症类型: Colorectal adenocarcinoma. 细胞大类: Granulocytes, 细胞小类: Granulocytes, 具体细胞名称: Granulocytes. 关键细胞标志物: CD66b, S100A8, S100A9. 表型类型: clinical phenotype, 主要表型标签: Immune Infiltration, 具体表型结果: tumor infiltration, 如何影响表型: . 发现技术: N/A. 研究模型/样本: cell line. 验证技术类型: transwell migration assay. 证据级别: . 核心证据描述: "This phenomenon implies that Wnt signalling pathway activation may play an important role by recruiting granulocytes and promote tumor infiltration in CRC liver metastasis. The exact role of Wnt signalling pathway activation in granulocytes during CRC liver metastasis will be explored in the future."

PMID: 31675496, 文献标题: Landscape and Dynamics of Single Immune Cells in Hepatocellular Carcinoma, 期刊: Cell, 研究年份: 2019. 物种: Human, 组织类型: Liver/Liver. 主要癌症类型: Hepatocellular Carcinoma, 详细癌症类型: Hepatocelluar carcinoma. 细胞大类: Macrophage, 细胞小类: Macrophage, 具体细胞名称: TAM-like macrophages. 关键细胞标志物: APOE, C1QA, C1QB, TREM2, SLC40A1, GPNMB. 表型类型: clinical phenotype, 主要表型标签: Survival, 具体表型结果: worse overall survival, 如何影响表型: . 发现技术: N/A. 研究模型/样本: clinical samples. 验证技术类型: survival analysis. 证据级别: clinical data. 核心证据描述: "Only the TAM-like signature was associated with a poor prognosis (p = 0.01, Cox regression)."

PMID: 32144411, 文献标题: Transcriptional diversity and bioenergetic shift in human breast cancer metastasis revealed by single-cell RNA sequencing, 期刊: Nature cell biology, 研究年份: 2020. 物种: Human, 组织类型: Breast/Breast. 主要癌症类型: Breast cancer, 详细癌症类型: Breast carcinoma. 细胞大类: Cancer cell, 细胞小类: Cancer cell, 具体细胞名称:  micrometastatic cells. 关键细胞标志物: PHLDA2. 表型类型: biological phenotype, 主要表型标签: Tumor Metastasis, 具体表型结果: attenuates the metastatic, 如何影响表型: . 发现技术: N/A. 研究模型/样本: MDA-MB-231 cells. 验证技术类型: Flow cytometry. 证据级别: protein. 核心证据描述: "Flow cytometry analysis showed an almost threefold decrease in the frequency of metastatic cells in the lungs of the treatment group (Fig. 6g), showing that OXPHOS inhi bition attenuates the metastatic capacity of MDA-MB-231 cells."

实体类型: 细胞表型. PMID: 32144411, 文献标题: Transcriptional diversity and bioenergetic shift in human breast cancer metastasis revealed by single-cell RNA sequencing, 期刊: Nature cell biology, 研究年份: 2020. 物种: Human, 组织类型: Breast/Breast. 主要癌症类型: Breast cancer, 详细癌症类型: Breast carcinoma. 细胞大类: Cancer cell, 细胞小类: Cancer cell, 具体细胞名称:  micrometastatic cells. 关键细胞标志物: PHLDA2. 表型类型: biological phenotype, 主要表型标签: Others, 具体表型结果: higher gene expression, 如何影响表型: . 发现技术: N/A. 研究模型/样本: mice. 验证技术类型: Quantitative PCR. 证据级别: RNA. 核心证据描述: "Quantitative PCR analysis of sorted TMRMhigh and TMRMlow cells confirmed that TMRMhigh cells express higher levels of the genes involved in mitochondrial biogenesis and the ETC, validating the TMRM assay in PDX cells (Fig. 4e)."

PMID: 32144411, 文献标题: Transcriptional diversity and bioenergetic shift in human breast cancer metastasis revealed by single-cell RNA sequencing, 期刊: Nature cell biology, 研究年份: 2020. 物种: Human, 组织类型: Breast/Breast. 主要癌症类型: Breast cancer, 详细癌症类型: Breast carcinoma. 细胞大类: Cancer cell, 细胞小类: Cancer cell, 具体细胞名称:  micrometastatic cells. 关键细胞标志物: PHLDA2. 表型类型: biological phenotype, 主要表型标签: Others, 具体表型结果: higher mitochondrial membrane potential, 如何影响表型: . 发现技术: N/A. 研究模型/样本: mice. 验证技术类型: Flow cytometry. 证据级别: protein. 核心证据描述: "Flow cytometry analysis showed that the mitochondrial membrane potential of micrometastases was threefold higher than primary tumour cells (P=0.0331; Fig. 4f)."

PMID: 32144411, 文献标题: Transcriptional diversity and bioenergetic shift in human breast cancer metastasis revealed by single-cell RNA sequencing, 期刊: Nature cell biology, 研究年份: 2020. 物种: Human, 组织类型: Breast/Breast. 主要癌症类型: Breast cancer, 详细癌症类型: Breast carcinoma. 细胞大类: Cancer cell, 细胞小类: Cancer cell, 具体细胞名称:  micrometastatic cells. 关键细胞标志物: PHLDA2. 表型类型: clinical phenotype, 主要表型标签: Tumor Recurrence, 具体表型结果: increased relapse, 如何影响表型: . 发现技术: N/A. 研究模型/样本: mice. 验证技术类型: survival analysis. 证据级别: clinical data. 核心证据描述: "Our survival analysis showed that PHLDA2 was significantly predictive of increased relapse (P=7.4×10−3; HR=1.44) in patients with basal-like breast cancer (Extended Data Fig. 3a)."

PMID: 32144411, 文献标题: Transcriptional diversity and bioenergetic shift in human breast cancer metastasis revealed by single-cell RNA sequencing, 期刊: Nature cell biology, 研究年份: 2020. 物种: Human, 组织类型: Breast/Breast. 主要癌症类型: Breast cancer, 详细癌症类型: Breast carcinoma. 细胞大类: Cancer cell, 细胞小类: Cancer cell, 具体细胞名称:  micrometastatic cells. 关键细胞标志物: PHLDA2. 表型类型: biological phenotype, 主要表型标签: Tumor Metastasis, 具体表型结果: metastasis, 如何影响表型: . 发现技术: N/A. 研究模型/样本: BALB/c mice. 验证技术类型: green fluorescent protein (GFP). 证据级别: protein. 核心证据描述: "We injected green fluorescent protein (GFP)-labelled 4T1 cells (1×105) into BALB/c mice and harvested the lungs of the mice 5d later, as 4T1 cells metastasize rapidly in the lung. Remarkably, the animals injected with oligomycin-treated 4T1–GFP cells displayed a sevenfold decrease in metastatic cells in their lungs at this early time point (Fig. 6h), suggesting OXPHOS is important to facilitate early events in the metastatic cascade."

PMID: 32686767, 文献标题: Single-cell transcriptomics reveals regulators underlying immune cell diversity and immune subtypes associated with prognosis in nasopharyngeal carcinoma, 期刊: cell research, 研究年份: 2020. 物种: Human, 组织类型: Nasopharynx/unknown. 主要癌症类型: Nasopharyngeal Carcinoma, 详细癌症类型: unknown. 细胞大类: Myeloid cell, 细胞小类: DC1, 具体细胞名称: CLEC9A+ dendritic cells. 关键细胞标志物: CLEC9A、XCR1、BATF3. 表型类型: clinical phenotype, 主要表型标签: Survival, 具体表型结果: Progression-Free Survival, 如何影响表型: improved survival. 发现技术: N/A. 研究模型/样本: clinical sample. 验证技术类型: survival analysis. 证据级别: clinical information. 核心证据描述: "Importantly, positive associations were significant between survival and the signatures of macrophages, pDCs, DC1, NK cells, and plasma cells in NPC Cohort A (Fig. 7d, e). Furthermore, these associations were also evident in NPC Cohort B (Supplementary information, Fig. S7a), validating their reliability as prognostic biomarkers in NPC."

Among all GZMB+ T cells (CD3/GZMB double positive), we observed a trend for higher fraction of GZMB+ T cells positive for PD-1 in the infiltrated tumors compared with the excluded tumors in the tumor epithelium (p = 0.077, Fig ure S3G), supporting the higher activation state of GZMB+ T cells in infiltrated tumors, specifically those in the tumor area."

PMID: 34040608, 文献标题: Development and Validation of a CD8+ T Cell Infiltration-Related Signature for Melanoma Patients, 期刊:  Frontiers in Immunology, 研究年份: 2021. 物种: Human, 组织类型: Skin/Skin. 主要癌症类型: Melanoma, 详细癌症类型: Melanoma. 细胞大类: T cell, 细胞小类: CD8+ T cells, 具体细胞名称: CD8+ T cells. 关键细胞标志物: CLEC4E、KLRD1、PSME1、KIR2DL4、CD274、GBP4. 表型类型: clinical phenotype, 主要表型标签: Drug Response, 具体表型结果: Immunotherapy Response, 如何影响表型: better. 发现技术: N/A. 研究模型/样本: clinical sample. 验证技术类型: Statistical Analysis. 证据级别: clinical information. 核心证据描述: "As risk score could indicate the immune activity, we furthter investigated the expression level of five hot immunotherapy targeted genes in melanoma patients with low and high risk score from datasets TCGA_SKCM and GSE65904. We found PDCD1LG2, CD274 and PDCD1 genes, which are all related to PD-1/PD-L1 signaling pathway that inhibit T cell function, had significantly higher expression level in low risk population than high risk population (Figure 7A).

Our results showed that the non-responder population had a significantly higher risk score than the responder either from dataset GSE35640 (Figure 7F).

Another dataset, the IMvigor210 cohort, contained comprehensive RNA expression data and clinical information of 297 patients with metastatic urothelial cancer who were treated with an anti-PD-L1 agent (atezolizumab) (54). We also calculated the risk score in the dataset and noticed that patients who were responders (complete response or partial response) to the immunotherapy had significantly lower risk score than those who were non-responders (stable disease or progression disease) to the treatment (Figure 7I, p = 0.002). More patients in the low risk group were found to be responders to atezolizumab (left half shown in Figure 7J), and the risk score was predictable for urothelial cancer patients’ response to the anti-PD-L1 agent in this dataset (Figure 7K, AUC=0.604)."

PMID: 35969151, 文献标题: Single-Cell Dissection of the Multiomic Landscape of High-Grade Serous Ovarian Cancer, 期刊: Cancer research, 研究年份: 2022. 物种: Human, 组织类型: Ovary/Ovary. 主要癌症类型: Ovarian cancer, 详细癌症类型: Ovarian carcinoma. 细胞大类: Cancer cell, 细胞小类: Cancer cell, 具体细胞名称: lineage A1 cells. 关键细胞标志物: CCN1, HSP90AA1. 表型类型: biological phenotype, 主要表型标签: Tumor Metastasis, 具体表型结果: migration, 如何影响表型: . 发现技术: N/A. 研究模型/样本: cell line SKOV3 and ES2. 验证技术类型: Transwell Assays. 证据级别: protein. 核心证据描述: "We knocked out CCN1 using the CRISPR-Cas9 system in ovarian cancer cell line SKOV3 and ES2 (Fig. 7B; Supplementary Fig. S7B). Results showed that knockout of CCN1 significantly restrained the migration and invasion of cancer cells by wound healing assay and transwell assays (Fig. 7C and D; Supplementary Figs. S7A and S7C). We inhibited HSP90AA1 using the HSP90a inhibitor TAS-116. We revealed that TAS-116 can dose dependently inhibit ovarian cancer cell migration and invasion (Fig. 7E–G; Supplementary Figs. S7D–S7F)."

PMID: 36550535, 文献标题: Parallel single‑cell and bulk transcriptome analyses reveal key features of the gastric tumor microenvironment, 期刊: Genome Biology, 研究年份: 2022. 物种: Human, 组织类型: Gut/Stomach. 主要癌症类型: Gastric Cancer, 详细癌症类型: Gastric Cancer. 细胞大类: Endothelial cell, 细胞小类: Activated endothelial cell, 具体细胞名称: EN10-SERPINE1. 关键细胞标志物: SERPINE1、RAMP2、PECAM1. 表型类型: clinical phenotype, 主要表型标签: Survival, 具体表型结果: Overall Survival, 如何影响表型: poor. 发现技术: N/A. 研究模型/样本: clinical sample. 验证技术类型: survival analysis. 证据级别: clinical information. 核心证据描述: "Cluster fraction comparison between normal and malignant gastric tissue identified clusters EN10-SERPINE1 and EN03-ESM1, hereafter referred to as activated endothelial cells, as almost exclusively tumor-specific cell types (Fig. 3b, S2g).

In line with angiogenesis being critical for sustained tumor growth, we speculated that these cell types might be linked to poor survival and found that SERPINE1 expression was associated with a drastically worsened survival in the independent gastric cancer cohort from TCGA (Fig. 3d).

Notably, patients with higher fraction of tumor-associated cell subtypes F13-CTHRC1 and EN10-SERPINE1 had significantly reduced survival time (Fig. 7a, b)."

PMID: 36719749, 文献标题: Single-cell characterization of anti-LAG-3 and anti-PD-1 combination treatment in patients with melanoma, 期刊: The Journal of clinical investigation, 研究年份: 2023. 物种: Human, 组织类型: Skin/Skin. 主要癌症类型: Melanoma, 详细癌症类型: melanoma. 细胞大类: T cell, 细胞小类: T cell, 具体细胞名称: CD4 T cell. 关键细胞标志物: CD4. 表型类型: biological phenotype, 主要表型标签: Drug Response, 具体表型结果: expandtion after Anti–LAG-3+anti–PD-1 treatment, 如何影响表型: . 发现技术: N/A. 研究模型/样本: clinical samples. 验证技术类型: flow cytometry. 证据级别: protein. 核心证据描述: "Following anti–LAG-3+anti–PD-1 treatment, we noted statistically significant NK and T cell expansions in the flow cytometric data (Padj < 0.05, Benjamini-Hochberg–corrected, 2-sided Mann-Whitney U test) only in patients with a response (CR/PR in IO-naive patients n = 7, CR/PR/SD in prior IO–refractory patients n = 10), and no expansion in patients without a response (SD/PD in IO-naive patients n = 6, PD in prior IO–refractory patients n = 13, Figure 3A and Supplemental Figure 5, A–C; patient details and full results are provided in Supplemental Table 1). "

PMID: 37434262, 文献标题: Spatially resolved transcriptomic profiles reveal unique defining molecular features of infiltrative 5ALA‑metabolizing cells associated with glioblastoma recurrence, 期刊: Genome Medicine, 研究年份: 2023. 物种: Human, 组织类型: Brain/Glioblastoma. 主要癌症类型: Glioblastoma, 详细癌症类型: Glioblastoma. 细胞大类: 5ALA+ cells, 细胞小类: 5ALA+ cells, 具体细胞名称: 5ALA+ cells. 关键细胞标志物: 5ALA. 表型类型: clinical phenotype, 主要表型标签: Survival, 具体表型结果: Overall Survival, 如何影响表型: associated with poor. 发现技术: N/A. 研究模型/样本: clinical sample. 验证技术类型: Cox regression analysis. 证据级别: clinical information. 核心证据描述: "To further investigate the impact of unique 5ALA + gene signatures on the survival of recurrent and primary GBM patients, a single-sample GSEA (ssGSEA) was performed on recurrent and primary tumors separately for the 5ALA + gene signatures. By combining the NES, a combined 5ALA + gene signature score was calculated for each tumor sample, followed by correlation analysis with survival data of recurrent and primary patients. 

Firstly, a univariate Cox regression analysis revealed that 5ALA + gene signature, Inf. wound response, MES, and Inf. response were significantly associated with poor survival in the recurrent cohort (Additional file 13: Table S12). The age and gender of the patients were not associated with survival (Additional file 13: Table S12)."

实体类型: 细胞表型. PMID: 37434262, 文献标题: Spatially resolved transcriptomic profiles reveal unique defining molecular features of infiltrative 5ALA‑metabolizing cells associated with glioblastoma recurrence, 期刊: Genome Medicine, 研究年份: 2023. 物种: Human, 组织类型: Brain/Glioblastoma. 主要癌症类型: Glioblastoma, 详细癌症类型: Glioblastoma. 细胞大类: 5ALA+ cells, 细胞小类: 5ALA+ cells, 具体细胞名称: 5ALA+ cells. 关键细胞标志物: 5ALA. 表型类型: clinical phenotype, 主要表型标签: Tumor Recurrence, 具体表型结果: Recurrence, 如何影响表型: associated with. 发现技术: N/A. 研究模型/样本: clinical sample. 验证技术类型: scRNA-seq. 证据级别: RNA. 核心证据描述: "Therefore, paired and unpaired analyses were performed for TCGA (Additional file 1: Fig. S12D). For CGGA and GLASS cohorts, primary and recurrent tumor samples are unpaired and paired, respectively. Enrichment analysis revealed an intriguing phenomenon where 5ALA + gene signature enrichment was observed in recurrent but not in primary tumors. 

To test the hypothesis that the 5ALA + gene signature is associated with recurrent GBM at single-cell resolution, we took advantage of the scRNA-seq dataset from matched primary and recurrent tissues from two GBM patients where the resected tissue samples were used to generate the patient-derived explants (PDEs) [70]. We retrieved the scRNA-seq data representing primary (N = 10,905) and recurrent (N = 8833) cells from PDEs. tSNE analysis coupled with Louvain clustering (Fig. 6F) followed by the mapping of 5ALA + UCell score onto the tSNE plot showed that a 5ALA + gene signature was markedly visible in a distinct cluster consisting of primary and recurrent tumor cells from the GBM patients (Fig. 6G). The comparative analysis confirmed our hypothesis that, recurrent GBM cells have significantly higher 5ALA + UCell scores compared to primary ones (p-value < 2.2 × 10−16) further underscoring the association between 5ALA + gene signature and GBM recurrence (Fig. 6H)."

PMID: 37475874, 文献标题: Single-cell transcriptome analysis reveals the clinical implications of myeloid-derived suppressor cells in head and neck squamous cell carcinoma, 期刊: Pathology & Oncology Research, 研究年份: 2023. 物种: Human, 组织类型: Head and neck/Head and neck. 主要癌症类型: Head and Neck Cancer, 详细癌症类型: Head and neck squamous cell carcinoma. 细胞大类: Myeloid cell, 细胞小类: Myeloid-derived suppressor cells, 具体细胞名称: MDSCs. 关键细胞标志物: S100A8, S100A9, IL1B. 表型类型: clinical phenotype, 主要表型标签: Survival, 具体表型结果: Overall Survival, 如何影响表型: worse. 发现技术: N/A. 研究模型/样本: clinical sample. 验证技术类型: Survival analysis. 证据级别: clinical analysis. 核心证据描述: ""By constructing the univariate Cox regression model, we found only the infiltration levels of MDSC showed a significant association with the patient’s overall survival (OS) probability in all three datasets (Figure 3B)." "Patients with highly-infiltrated MDSCs usually suffer poor prognostic outcomes, suggesting MDSC infiltration was a prognostic risk factor (HR > 1 and p-value <0.05)." "In addition, we constructed the multivariate Cox regression model to explore the correlation between MDSC infiltration and patient OS probability adjusting the effects of tumor stage, age, and gender. The result showed that the MDSC infiltration was an independent factor for predicting the prognostic risk (Figure 3C).""

PMID: 37483625, 文献标题: Integrated analyses of single-cell transcriptomics identify metastasis-associated myeloid subpopulations in breast cancer lung metastasis, 期刊:  Frontiers in Immunology, 研究年份: 2023. 物种: Mouse, Human, 组织类型: Lung/Lung. 主要癌症类型: Breast Cancer, 详细癌症类型: Breast Cancer. 细胞大类: Myeloid cell, 细胞小类: Neutrophils, 具体细胞名称: IFIT3+ neutrophils. 关键细胞标志物: IFIT3、Ifi27l2a、Pim1、Cxcl2. 表型类型: clinical phenotype, 主要表型标签: Tumor Metastasis, 具体表型结果: Metastasis, 如何影响表型: promotes. 发现技术: N/A. 研究模型/样本: clinical sample. 验证技术类型: MMTV-PyVT transgenic mice. 证据级别: mice model. 核心证据描述: "Obviously, the percent of cluster 7 (Ifit3+ neutrophils) is increased in the lung metastasis group and all metastatic stages. In the normal lung, the percent of cluster 8 (Cd14+ neutrophils) is far higher than all lung-metastasis groups (Figure 4C and Supplementary Figure 6C). The hierarchical clustering displays the network of cluster classifications (Figure 4D).

Then, we performed immunofluorescence staining on the normal lung, primary tumor, and metastatic lung sections using the markers of Tppp3+ monocytes (LY6C and TPPP3), Isg15+ macrophages (F4/80 and ISG15), Ifit3+ neutrophils (MPO and IFIT3), and Il12b+ DCs (CD11c and IL12B) (Figure 6C). The metastasis-associated myeloid cells are indicated by pink arrows, which point out the colocalization of metastasis-associated markers and myeloid cells. The immunofluorescence results are summarized in the plots, which compare the proportions of metastasis-associated myeloid subpopulations between the normal lung or primary tumor and metastatic lung environments (Figure 6D). The results from MMTV-PyVT mice show that TPPP3+ monocytes, ISG15+ macrophages, IFIT3+ neutrophils, and IL12B+ DCs are mainly present in the tumor-reprogrammed lung microenvironment, and the metastasis-associated myeloid subpopulations are validated at the protein level. "

PMID: 37653425, 文献标题: Single‑cell transcriptomics reveals multiple chemoresistant properties in leukemic stem and progenitor cells in pediatric AML, 期刊: Genome Biology, 研究年份: 2023. 物种: Human, 组织类型: Bone/Bone Marrow. 主要癌症类型: Acute Myeloid Leukemia, 详细癌症类型: Pediatric and Adult AML. 细胞大类: Leukemic Cell, 细胞小类: HSC-like Cells, 具体细胞名称: CD69+ HSC-like Cells. 关键细胞标志物: CD69、CD34, MLLT3, MSI2, LYL1, HOPX. 表型类型: biological phenotype, 主要表型标签: Drug Response, 具体表型结果: chemoresistance, 如何影响表型: . 发现技术: N/A. 研究模型/样本: clinical sample. 验证技术类型: Flow cytometry. 证据级别: clinical sample. 核心证据描述: "Notably, the presence of CD69+ HSC-like cells is associated with unfavorable genetic mutations, the persistence of residual tumor cells in chemotherapy, and poor outcomes in independent pediatric and adult public AML cohorts.

At the end of the first cycle of the chemotherapy regimen, 37.9% (44/116) of patients were found to be MRD-positive, with a clinical cutoff of 0.1%. Notably, the MRD positivity rate for the CD69+-high group was 61.1% (22/36), which was significantly higher than that of the CD69+-low group, irrespective of the therapeutic regimen used (22/80, 27.5%, p=0.0009; Fig. 7e and Additional file 1: Fig. S9e)."

 The predictive accuracy of the risk signature was validated in two external cohorts, GSE96058 and METABRIC (Supplementary Figures 3C, D). The expression profiles of signature CAFRGs in these two groups were consistent with those in the training cohort. (Figures 5D, F). Patients in the high-CAFRS group in both cohorts had significantly shorter survival (P< 0.001) (Figures 5C, E). "

PMID: 38482016, 文献标题: Decoding the tumor microenvironment and molecular mechanism: unraveling cervical cancer subpopulations and prognostic signatures through scRNA-Seq and bulk RNA-seq analyses, 期刊: Frontiers in Immunology, 研究年份: 2024. 物种: Human, 组织类型: Gynecological/Cervix. 主要癌症类型: Cervical Cancer, 详细癌症类型: Cervical carcinoma. 细胞大类: Epithelial cell, 细胞小类: Tumor Epithelial Progenitor Cells, 具体细胞名称: C3 PLP2+ Tumor Epithelial Progenitor Cells. 关键细胞标志物: PLP2、CXCL17、CLDN7、CEACAM5、KRT19、CEACAM6、S100A9、TACSTD2、CSTA、SLPI、SPINK5. 表型类型: clinical phenotype, 主要表型标签: Survival, 具体表型结果: Overall Survival, 如何影响表型: worse. 发现技术: N/A. 研究模型/样本: clinical sample. 验证技术类型: survival analysis. 证据级别: clinical information. 核心证据描述: "Compared with low PLP2+ Tumor EPCs score group, the prognosis of high PLP2+ Tumor EPCs score group was worse. As we expected, high PLP2+ Tumor EPCs score was associated with worse clinical outcome, while low PLP2+ Tumor EPCs score was associated with better clinical outcome (P < 0.0001).

Based on the median PLP2+ Tumor EPCs score, all data were divided into two groups: high and low PLP2+ Tumor EPCs score group, and Kaplan Meier curve showed the survival analysis of the two groups. The ROC curve of the survival plot. The area under the curve (AUC) was 0.762, 0.733 and 0.781 for 1, 3 and 5 years, respectively."

PMID: 38562930, 文献标题: Deciphering the molecular landscape: integrating single-cell transcriptomics to unravel myoﬁbroblast dynamics and therapeutic targets in clear cell renal cell carcinomas, 期刊:  Frontiers in Immunology, 研究年份: 2024. 物种: Human, 组织类型: Kidney/Kidney. 主要癌症类型: Renal cell carcinoma, 详细癌症类型: Clear cell type. 细胞大类: Fibroblast, 细胞小类: Myofibroblast, 具体细胞名称: C3 HMGA1+ Myofibroblasts. 关键细胞标志物: HMGA1. 表型类型: biological phenotype, 主要表型标签: Tumor Invasion, 具体表型结果: invasion and migration, 如何影响表型: promotes. 发现技术: N/A. 研究模型/样本: cell lines. 验证技术类型: Transwell assay, wound healing assay. 证据级别: cell. 核心证据描述: "Our deduction is that the C3, identified as a key subpopulation of Myofibroblasts, likely harbors the most potent interactions with tumor cells. Further scrutiny into the interactions involving the C3 subpopulation and other subpopulations (Figures 8G–I) brought to light that the MPZ signaling pathway network held particular significance among the subpopulations. Notably, MPZL1, a pivotal gene in this pathway, scored the highest within the C3 subpopulation.

The Transwell assay results (Figure 12D) revealed markedly reduced staining regions in cells with MPZL1 knockdown, indicating a diminished invasive capability. In cell scratch assay experiments (Figure 12E), the 48-hour scratch width in both cell lines subjected to MPZL1 knockdown was significantly wider compared to the negative control group. "

Scratch assay and Transwell experiments further showed that PTGES3 gene silencing inhibited the migratory and invasive capabilities of HCCLM3 and Huh-7 cells. These data suggest that PTGES3 acts as a positive regulator in HCC cell biology (Fig. 13G-I)."

Statistical significance was discernible in the survival curves corresponding to AKR1C3, PTGES3, and SQLE (Fig. 7B-E).

To validate the prognostic roles of the above risk model, we applied the same stratification method to three independent datasets form the GEO database. Consistent with the findings from the training cohort, patients with in the high ARRSs group displayed significantly worse survival outcomes compared with the low ARRSs group in all three cohorts, namely GSE50081 (HR = 0.32, 95% CI = 0.18 - 0.56, P = 0.000081), GSE30219 (HR = 0.52, 95% CI = 0.29 - 0.95, P = 0.038), and GSE31210 (HR = 0.36, 95% CI = 0.19 - 0.71, P = 0.005) (Figures 1G-I)."

Cell Counting Kit-8 (CCK-8) experiments demonstrated that PTGES3 knockdown suppressed the proliferative capacity of HCCLM3 and Huh-7 cells (Fig. 13D-E). "

PMID: 39835116, 文献标题: Single-cell sequencing analysis reveals cancer-associated pericyte subgroup in esophageal squamous cell carcinoma to predict prognosis, 期刊:  Frontiers in Immunology, 研究年份: 2025. 物种: Human, 组织类型: Esophagus/Esophageal squamous cell carcinoma. 主要癌症类型: Esophageal Cancer, 详细癌症类型: Esophageal squamous cell carcinoma. 细胞大类: Pericyte, 细胞小类: cancer-associated pericyte subgroup, 具体细胞名称: c4_SOD2 pericytes. 关键细胞标志物: SOD2. 表型类型: clinical phenotype, 主要表型标签: Survival, 具体表型结果: Overall Survival, 如何影响表型: negatively correlated with prognosis. 发现技术: N/A. 研究模型/样本: clinical sample. 验证技术类型: Multiplex immunofluorescence (mIF). 证据级别: protein. 核心证据描述: "We performed a survival analysis of the genes characterizing the top50 of the six subpopulations of pericytes combined with the prognostic information of the patients (Figure 2F), and found that c4_SOD2 and c5_TYMS were significantly different from prognosis. Interestingly, c4_SOD2 was negatively correlated with prognosis, while c5_TYMS was positively correlated with prognosis. 

Therefore, we compared them in tumor tissue samples from patients with different prognoses. c5_TYMS expression was higher in patients with good prognosis, and the opposite was true for those with poor prognosis (Figures 5A, B); c4_SOD2 expression was lower in patients with good prognosis, and the opposite was true for those with poor prognosis as well (Figures 5C, D), which was consistent with the results of the survival analysis Consistent."

PMID: 39953119, 文献标题: B-cell signatures characterize the immune landscape and predict LUAD prognosis via the integration of scRNA-seq and bulk RNA-seq, 期刊: scientific reports, 研究年份: 2025. 物种: human, 组织类型: lung/lung. 主要癌症类型: Lung Cancer, 详细癌症类型: Lung adenocarcinoma. 细胞大类: B cell, 细胞小类: B cells, 具体细胞名称: B cells. 关键细胞标志物: IGHG1、CD19、CD79A. 表型类型: clinical phenotype, 主要表型标签: Survival, 具体表型结果: overall survival, 如何影响表型: improved. 发现技术: N/A. 研究模型/样本: clinical sample. 验证技术类型: survival analysis. 证据级别: clinical information. 核心证据描述: "Overall, we identified 8 major cell types in this step, including monocytes-macrophages, T cells, epithelial cells, endothelial cells, natural killer (NK) cells, B/plasma cells, fibroblasts, and neutrophil cell. We identified 125 markers of B cells. Patients in the high-risk group had worse outcomes and shorter survival times.

In GSE50081 dataset, the patients also showed a survival disadvantage and increased mortality as the risk of LUAD patients increased. The AUC areas predicted for risk, 1-year, 3-year, and 5-year survival were also all >0.5 in GSE50081 dataset, showing good predictive performance of the model."

PMID: 40025504, 文献标题: High-dimensional deconstruction of HNSC reveals clinically distinct cellular states and ecosystems that are associated with prognosis and therapy response, 期刊: Journal of Translational Medicine, 研究年份: 2025. 物种: Human, 组织类型: Head and neck/Head and neck. 主要癌症类型: Head and Neck Cancer, 详细癌症类型: Head and Neck Squamous Cell Carcinoma. 细胞大类: Fibroblast, 细胞小类: Fibroblast, 具体细胞名称: ACTA2+ fibroblast. 关键细胞标志物: ACTA2 and COLLA1. 表型类型: clinical phenotype, 主要表型标签: Drug Response, 具体表型结果: Chemotherapy Response, 如何影响表型: worse. 发现技术: N/A. 研究模型/样本: clinical sample. 验证技术类型: Multicolor immunofluorescence. 证据级别: protein. 核心证据描述: ""Conversely, patients with a high abundance of ACTA2+fibroblast (S02) exhibited the worst prognosis in response to chemotherapy (Fig. 6A). In these same cohorts, ACTA2+fibroblast (S02) abundance was markedly reduced in chemotherapy-sensitive patients (Fig. 6C). Additionally, we further validated the impact of ACTA2+fibroblast (S02) abundance on chemotherapy sensitivity in the TMA chemotherapy cohort, confirming that high levels of ACTA2+fibroblasts consistently indicated chemotherapy resistance across all cohorts (Fig. 6D, E and Supplementary Table 7).""

In Fig. 3E, we further explored the relationship between ACTA2 + fibroblast abundance and prognosis in both the publicly available datasets and the Xiangya HNSC TMA cohort. Consistently, a higher abundance of ACTA2 + fibroblast was correlated with poorer prognosis across all cohorts analyzed.""

PMID: 40264753, 文献标题: Cancer-associated ﬁbroblasts gene signature: a novel approach to survival prediction and immunotherapy guidance in colon cancer, 期刊:  Frontiers in Immunology, 研究年份: 2025. 物种: Human, 组织类型: Gut/Colon. 主要癌症类型: Colorectal Cancer, 详细癌症类型: Colon Adenocarcinoma. 细胞大类: Fibroblast, 细胞小类: Cancer-associated fibroblasts, 具体细胞名称: Cancer-associated fibroblasts. 关键细胞标志物: HSPA1A、P4HA1、MAN1B1、CCPS7A、SLC9A3R2、RAB7A. 表型类型: clinical phenotype, 主要表型标签: Drug Response, 具体表型结果: drug sensitivity, 如何影响表型: associated with better drug sensitivity. 发现技术: N/A. 研究模型/样本: clinical sample. 验证技术类型: Drug sensitivity analysis. 证据级别: clinical information. 核心证据描述: "Additionally, the differences in IC50 levels of chemotherapy drugs between the low-risk and high-risk groups in the TCGA-COAD cohort were investigated (Figures 7A-E). The analysis revealed that individuals in the low-risk category had higher IC50 values for anticancer drugs such as gemcitabine, gefitinib, docetaxel, camptothecin, and sorafenib. Comparable findings were noted in the GSE17536 (Figures 7F-J) and GSE159216 (Figures 7K-O) validation cohorts. These results indicate that the CAFG signature could be a useful predictor for selecting appropriate anticancer drugs in COAD treatment."

PMID: 40264753, 文献标题: Cancer-associated ﬁbroblasts gene signature: a novel approach to survival prediction and immunotherapy guidance in colon cancer, 期刊:  Frontiers in Immunology, 研究年份: 2025. 物种: Human, 组织类型: Gut/Colon. 主要癌症类型: Colorectal Cancer, 详细癌症类型: Colon Adenocarcinoma. 细胞大类: Fibroblast, 细胞小类: Cancer-associated fibroblasts, 具体细胞名称: Cancer-associated fibroblasts. 关键细胞标志物: HSPA1A、P4HA1、MAN1B1、CCPS7A、SLC9A3R2、RAB7A. 表型类型: clinical phenotype, 主要表型标签: Survival, 具体表型结果: Overall Survival, 如何影响表型: associated with worse survival. 发现技术: N/A. 研究模型/样本: clinical sample. 验证技术类型: Cox regression. 证据级别: clinical information. 核心证据描述: "Risk Score =(-0.66451*CTNNA1 expression)+(0.25692*HSPA1A expression)+(0.72129*P4HA1 expression)+(-0.72811*PPP2CB expression)+(0.85761 *MAN1B1 expression)+(-0.74474*LRRC59 expression)+(1.17154*CCPS7A expression)+(0.52996*SLC9A3R2 expression)+(1.21188*RAB7A expression) +(-0.92288*CAMTA1 expression)+(-0.39307*WIPI1 expression). Among the 11 identified prognostic genes, six (HSPA1A, P4HA1, MAN1B1, CCPS7A, SLC9A3R2, and RAB7A) were classified as risk-associated genes (HR > 1), while CTNNA1, PPP2CB, LRRC59, CAMTA1, and WIPI1 were regarded as protective genes (HR < 1). The CAFG risk score was calculated for each person by leveraging these genes. Subsequently, the TCGA-COAD, GSE17536, and GSE159216 cohorts were separated into low-risk and high-risk groups based on the median risk scores. Studies revealed that individuals belonging to the low-risk group showed better OS outcomes in comparison to those in the high-risk group (TCGA, HR = 3.272, 95% CI: 2.008-5.332, P < 0.001; GSE159216, HR = 1.924, 95% CI: 1.197-3.092, P = 0.031; GSE17536, HR = 1.496, 95% CI: 1.708-2.075, P = 0.005, Figures 3D-F). "

PMID: 40312694, 文献标题: Integrated analysis of single-cell RNA-seq and bulk RNA-seq unravels the molecular feature of tumor-associated neutrophils of head and neck squamous cell carcinoma, 期刊: BMC Cancer, 研究年份: 2025. 物种: Human, 组织类型: oral/oral cavity. 主要癌症类型: Head and Neck Cancer, 详细癌症类型: Head and Neck Squamous Cell Carcinoma. 细胞大类: Neutrophil, 细胞小类: Neutrophil, 具体细胞名称: Tumor-associated neutrophils. 关键细胞标志物: LYZ、G0S2、IL1B、CD14. 表型类型: clinical phenotype, 主要表型标签: Survival, 具体表型结果: Overall Survival, 如何影响表型: worse. 发现技术: N/A. 研究模型/样本: clinical sample. 验证技术类型: survival analysis. 证据级别: clinical information. 核心证据描述: "The processed TCGA-HNSCC dataset, incorporating survival data from the TCGA database, was randomly partitioned into a training set and a test set in a 3:1 ratio. HNSCC patients were stratified into high NRS (H-NRS) and low NRS (L-NRS) groups according to the median risk score derived from the TCGA training set. Survival distribution analysis demonstrated a significant difference in survival rates between the two groups, with the H-NRS associated with a worse prognosis and a 5-year survival rate below 50% (Fig. 2E-F). Furthermore, the ROC curve results for both the training and test sets indicate the model demonstrates good validation performance (Fig. 2I-J), highlighting the significant potential of NRS in predicting clinical outcomes in HNSCC. Consistent with prior research findings, the external independent validation datasets (GSE41613, GSE65858) demonstrated that the H-NRS group exhibited poorer prognostic outcomes (Fig. 2G-H and 2 K-L). "

Further enrichment analysis demonstrated that high PHLDA1 expression activated classic protumor pathways such as the EMT, KRAS, and TGFB pathways (Figure 7I). Moreover, patients with high PHLDA1 expression also presented increased expression of chemokines and TNF family members, including CCL5, CCR1, and TNFRSF1B (Figures 7J, K). Spatial transcriptome analysis can better observe the spatial location of cells based on more spatial information. Through the examination of seven key genes’ expression levels, only PHLDA1 was highly expressed in CAFs in the pancreatic cancer group, suggesting that this gene could be a potential procancer CAF marker (Figure 7A).

According to survival analysis, patients with high PHLDA1 expression had a worse prognosis than patients with low PHLDA1 expression, which suggested that PHLDA1 could be a possible prognostic marker for pancreatic cancer (Figures 9A, B)."

PMID: 40688078, 文献标题: Integrated multiomics analysis identifies PHLDA1+ fibroblasts as prognostic biomarkers and mediators of biological functions in pancreatic cancer, 期刊:  Frontiers in Immunology, 研究年份: 2025. 物种: Human, 组织类型: Digestive system/Pancreas. 主要癌症类型: Pancreatic cancer, 详细癌症类型: Pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma. 细胞大类: Fibroblast, 细胞小类: Cancer-associated fibroblast (CAF), 具体细胞名称: PHLDA1+ CAF. 关键细胞标志物: PHLDA1、FAP、COL1A1、POSTN. 表型类型: biological phenotype, 主要表型标签: Tumor Growth, 具体表型结果: tumor cell proliferation, 如何影响表型: promotes. 发现技术: N/A. 研究模型/样本: clinical sample. 验证技术类型: CCK-8 assay, colony formation assay. 证据级别: cell. 核心证据描述: "Notably, PHLDA1 was uniquely overexpressed in CAFs and correlated with the activation of key protumorigenic pathways, including EMT, KRAS, and TGF-β, underscoring its central role in modulating the crosstalk between CAFs and malignant ductal cells.

Following the previous analysis, immunofluorescence was performed on the tumor sample and adjuvant tumor sample, and the findings indicated that PHLDA1 was expressed primarily in CAFs in pancreatic cancer (Figure 9H). As demonstrated in Figures 10A–C, downregulating PHLDA1 in CAFs dramatically decreased tumor cell proliferation activity, and similar results were achieved in colony formation assays. Additionally, patient-derived organoids were cocultured with CAFs, and we discovered that when PHLDA1 expression was reduced in CAFs, organoid proliferation ability was limited (Figures 10D, E). "

This observation suggests that whereas infiltration with B cells (reflected in total unnormalized FCRL4 expression) was a weakly positive factor, higher proportion of FCRL4-expressing B cells represented a negative factor, probably related to the higher degree of B cells exhaustion and involvement of negative feedback mechanisms of BCR signaling"

Effective suppression of PTPRG expression was confirmed by qRT-PCR (Figure 9A, B), and subsequent CCK-8 assays revealed a significant reduction in cell viability upon PTPRG knockdown (Figure 9C, D). Consistently, both flow cytometric analysis and Western blotting demonstrated an increased apoptotic fraction in PTPRG-depleted cells (Figure 9E–H), indicating that PTPRG loss inhibits proliferation and promotes apoptosis in MM."

 Subsequent CCK-8 and colony formation assays demonstrated that GNA15 knockdown dramatically suppressed proliferative capacity and compromised malignant phenotypes in TNBC cells ( Figures 9C, D ). Furthermore, GNA15 depletion substantially attenuated invasion rates in both cell lines ( Figure 9E ), while migration assays revealed significantly reduced migratory capacity in knockdown groups versus controls ( Figures 9F, G ). "

PMID: 37488671.0, 文献标题: Integrated single-cell and spatial transcriptomic profiling reveals higher intratumour heterogeneity and epithelial–fibroblast interactions in recurrent bladder cancer, 期刊: clinical and translational medicine, 研究年份: 2023. 物种: human, 组织类型: bladder/bladder. 主要癌症类型: Bladder cancer, 详细癌症类型: bladder cancer. 主要空间层级: Cellular neighbourhoods, 具体空间结构名称: C1 (epithelial and basal cells). 组成细胞类型: Epithelial cells, Basal cells. 表型类型: Biological phenotype, 主要表型: Tumor Recurrence, 具体表型: Tumor Recurrence. 发现技术: Spatial transcriptome.验证技术类型: multiplex immunofluorescence. 证据级别: protein. 核心证据描述: "Interestingly, spatially proximal differential analysis of cell types revealed that the interaction between C1 (epithelial and basal cells) and C0 (NK and T cells) was enhanced in the recurrent group as opposed to the primary group (Figure 3A and Table S5), while the con tent and ratio versus total spots of both C1 and C0 were lower in the recurrent group.
We confirmed the upregulated colocalisation of epithelial cells, keratinocytes and basal cells (Figure 3D,F) with NK and CD8+ T cells in the recurrent group, implying more complex tumour microenvironments in the recurrent group.
Quantitative analysis was also performed to show the difference in colocalisation of NK/T and epithelial/basal cells between primary and recurrent groups (Figure 4D,E). Overall, these immunofluorescence results further demonstrated the increased immune complexity in recurrent tumours. "

PMID: 39386756.0, 文献标题: Single-cell RNA sequencing and spatial transcriptomics of bladder Ewing sarcoma, 期刊: iScience, 研究年份: 2024. 物种: human, 组织类型: bladder/bladder. 主要癌症类型: Bladder cancer, 详细癌症类型: Bladder Ewing sarcoma/primitive neuroectodermal tumor (bladder ES/PNET). 主要空间层级: Cell co-localization, 具体空间结构名称: interaction between bladder ES-Epi and bladder ES-Mast cells. 组成细胞类型: Bladder ES-Mast cells, bladder ES-Epi cells. 表型类型: Biological phenotype, 主要表型: Tumor Invasion, 具体表型: Invasion. 发现技术: Single-cell RNA-sequencing, spatial transcriptomic.验证技术类型: multiple immunoflfluorescence, Functional experiments. 证据级别: protein. 核心证据描述: "The investigation identified the ‘‘TNFSF12-TNFRSF12A’’ ligand-receptor pair as notably present in bladder ES-Epi/bladder→ES-Mast cells compared with the relationships between bladder ES-Epi and the other two mast cell subclusters (Figure 6N).
9 Initial assessment of TNFRSF12A expression in BLCA revealed its overexpression in tumors, with higher expression associated with advanced pathological staging and a poorer prognosis (Figure S8).
Subsequent examination of TNFRSF12A expression in bladder ES/PNET and BLCA tissue samples revealed significant overexpression in bladder ES/ PNET (Figure 6P).
Additionally, multiple immunofluorescence staining results showed that the tumor-associated mast cell marker gene TPGS2 co-localized with TNFSF12, and the tumor-associated epithelial cell marker gene INHBC co-localized with TNFRSF12A (Figure S10)
Functional experiments suggested that exogenous TNFRSF12 significantly enhanced the migration abilities of the ES cell line RD-ES and BLCA cell line T24, as well as the angiogenesis ability of RD-ES, while Enavatuzumab exerts the opposite function (Figures 6Q, S11A, and S11B)
Finally, spatial analysis results revealed mutual interactions between mast cells and epithelial cells, with TNFSF12-TNFRSF12A interactions occurring at the spatial level (Figure 6R). "

PMID: 38640932.0, 文献标题: Identification of hypoxic macrophages in glioblastoma with therapeutic potential for vasculature normalization., 期刊: Cancer Cell, 研究年份: 2024. 物种: Human, 组织类型: Brain/Brain. 主要癌症类型: Brain cancer, 详细癌症类型: Glioblastoma . 主要空间层级: Spatial niche, 具体空间结构名称: Peri-necrotic regions. 组成细胞类型: Hypoxia-TAM(defined as ADM+/Galectin-3+ Mo-TAMs), endothelial cells. 表型类型: Clinical phenotype, 主要表型: Drug Response, 具体表型: Dampen drug delivery. 发现技术: Spatial transcriptome.验证技术类型: Intravital imaging, Multiplex immunostaining. 证据级别: protein,mouse. 核心证据描述: "Genetic ablation or pharmacological blockade of adrenomedullin produced by Hypoxia-TAM restores vascular integrity, improves intratumoral concentration of the anti-tumor agent dabrafenib, and achieves combinatorial therapeutic benefits
 Co-staining for ADM and the Mo-TAM marker galectin-316 confirmed the proximity of Hypoxia-TAM (defined as ADM+/Galectin-3+ Mo-TAMs) to the pseudo-palisading necrotic areas in hGBM tissues
AMA administration with dabrafenib achieved combinatorial therapeutic benefits in extending animal survival (Figure 8D) and reducing tumor burden "

实体类型: 空间层级表型. PMID: 36725935.0, 文献标题: Single-cell spatial immune landscapes of primary and metastatic brain tumours, 期刊: nature, 研究年份: 2023. 物种: human, 组织类型: brain/brain. 主要癌症类型: Brain cancer, 详细癌症类型: primary brain 
tumours or BrM. 主要空间层级: Spatial niche, 具体空间结构名称: a unique macrophage-enriched neighbourhood. 组成细胞类型: MPO-positive macrophages. 表型类型: Clinical phenotype, 主要表型: Overall Survival, 具体表型:  improved survival. 发现技术: IMC.验证技术类型: immunohistofluorescence co-staining. 证据级别: protein. 核心证据描述: "We compared the proportion of cells representing each CN within a given tumour sample, and found that LTS tumours had significantly higher representation of macrophage-enriched CN7 than STS tumours (Fig. 3d). Moreover, using this refined cohort, we confirmed the association between CN7 and improved survival (Fig. 3e and Extended Data Fig. 9g).
In comparing the relative representation of CL1–3 across each CN (Fig. 3b), we observed an enrichment in CN7 specifically in patients with LTS tumours (Fig. 3i). Together, these data indicate that macrophage spatial relationships may contain critical prognostic information, as we have identified a unique macrophage-enriched neighbourhood associated with long-term survival—a rarity in this disease.
To test the practicality of our findings using a lower-plex technology, we performed immunohistofluorescence co-staining for MPO and IBA1 to evaluate survival outcomes in a cohort of 135 patients with glioblastoma. As the vast majority (83.96%) of MPO+ macrophages are CD163− and P2Y12− (Extended Data Fig. 10a), the combination of MPO with IBA1 was sufficient to confirm significantly prolonged survival in patients with high frequencies of double-positive cells (Fig. 4h)."

实体类型: 空间层级表型. PMID: 38994023.0, 文献标题: The CEBPB+ glioblastoma subcluster specifically drives the formation of M2 tumor-associated macrophages to promote malignancy growth, 期刊: Theranostics, 研究年份: 2024. 物种: human, 组织类型: brain/brain. 主要癌症类型: Brain cancer, 详细癌症类型: glioblastoma. 主要空间层级: Cellular neighbourhoods, 具体空间结构名称: Spatially clustered glioblastoma subcluster 6 and M2 TAMs distribution. 组成细胞类型: Glioblastoma subcluster 6 (CEBPB+) cells and M2 TAMs. 表型类型: Biological phenotype, 主要表型: Tumor Growth, 具体表型: Tumor growth. 发现技术: Cell culture.验证技术类型: mouse models. 证据级别: mouse. 核心证据描述: "Nonetheless, the results of high-throughput sequencing suggest a positive correlation between the high expression of CEBPB in GBM subcluster 6 and M2 TAMs.
Subsequent Transwell cell migration assays demonstrated that conditioned medium (CM) from GBM cells overexpressing CEBPB significantly enhanced the migration of M0 macrophages (PMA-primed U937 cells). (Figure 5D-F).
Interestingly, following prolonged exposure (3 days) of M0 macrophages to conditioned media from GBM cells overexpressing CEBPB, the expression of M2-like markers CD206, CD163, and ARG1 sharply increased. In contrast, this trend was notably diminished upon exposure to conditioned media from CEBPB-depleted GBM cells, while there was no change in the expression of M1-like markers (iNOS, TNFα, and CD80) (Figure 5G-I, Figure S13D). These results suggest that the genes regulated by CEBPB might encompass factors involved in M2 polarization of macrophages.
These findings suggest that CEBPB is also implicated in TAMs recruitment and M2 polarization in vivo. The subsequent in vivo experiment demonstrated that the depletion of CEBPB in transplanted glioma cells visually reduced the growth of the tumors and extended the survival time of the mice bearing glioma cells (Figure 6F-H, Figure S13E-G). "

实体类型: 空间层级表型. PMID: 38994023.0, 文献标题: The CEBPB+ glioblastoma subcluster specifically drives the formation of M2 tumor-associated macrophages to promote malignancy growth, 期刊: Theranostics, 研究年份: 2024. 物种: human, 组织类型: brain/brain. 主要癌症类型: Brain cancer, 详细癌症类型: glioblastoma. 主要空间层级: Cell co-localization, 具体空间结构名称: Co-localization of CEBPB, SPP1, Integrin αvβ1, and M2 macrophages in their spatial distribution. 组成细胞类型: Glioblastoma subcluster 6 (CEBPB+) cells and M2 TAMs. 表型类型: Clinical phenotype, 主要表型: Overall Survival, 具体表型: Shorter survival. 发现技术: spatial transcriptomics, multiplex immunofluorescence.验证技术类型: survivsl analysis. 证据级别: clinical data. 核心证据描述: "Consistent with our previous findings on intercellular communication, we observed co-localization of CEBPB, SPP1, Integrin αvβ1, and M2 macrophages in their spatial distribution (Figure 8G).
We discovered that inhibiting SPP1 reversed the tumor progression and extended survival times caused by the overexpression of CEBPB in vivo (Figure 8J-K), which was associated to change the number of SPP1/Integrin αvβ1/phosphorylated-Akt-positive M2 TAMs in the xenograft tumors (Figure 8L-M, Figure S16).
Clinically, simultaneous high expression of CEBPB, SPP1, and Integrin αvβ1 not only leads to a high enrichment of M2 TAMs in GBM tissues but also significantly shortens the lifespan of GBM patients (Figure 8N-O, Figure S15D-E). "

实体类型: 空间层级表型. PMID: 35177622.0, 文献标题: T-cell dysfunction in the glioblastoma microenvironment is mediated by myeloid cells releasing interleukin-10, 期刊: nature communication, 研究年份: 2022. 物种: human, 组织类型: brain/brain. 主要癌症类型: Brain cancer, 详细癌症类型: Glioblastomas. 主要空间层级: Cellular neighbourhoods, 具体空间结构名称: overlap between exhausted T cells and HMOX1+ myeloid cells. 组成细胞类型: HMOX1+ myeloid cells, CD8+ T cells. 表型类型: Biological phenotype, 主要表型: Immune Suppression, 具体表型: immunosuppressive. 发现技术: Spatial transcriptomics.验证技术类型: human neocortical GBM model. 证据级别: Protein, human model. 核心证据描述: "spatially resolved and single-cell gene expression data of 45,615 immune cells from 12 tumor samples, that a subset of Interleukin-10-releasing HMOX1+ myeloid cells, spatially localizing to mesenchymal-like tumor regions, drive T-cell exhaustion and thus contribute to the immunosuppressive tumor microenvironment.
We found that myeloid cells from two clusters (aMΦ, bMΦ, Supplementary Fig. 5), characterized by the expression of tumor-associated macrophage genes (CD163, CCL4, APOE, and HLA-DRA) were strongly connected to the CD8+ exhausted and CD4+ Th1 T cell clusters.
To further validate potential interactions between the myeloid–lymphoid compartment, we isolated CD3+ IBA1+ (gene: CD3D and AIF1) doublets from our dataset, Fig. 5h.
When comparing the gene expression profile of our top connected cell pairs (Ligand cells: Myeloid cells; Receiver cells: T cells) with the CD3+ IBA1+ doublets, a strong expression of both CD163 and HMOX1 was observed, Fig. 5j underpinning the observation that physically connected cells mainly arise from our identified CD163+HMOX1+ myeloid subpopulation, Fig. 5k.
This was carried out by reconstructing the spatial juxtaposition, where we found HMOX1+ IBA1+ microglia were present in close proximity to a tumor (p < 0.023) and T cells (p < 0.001), compared to HMOX1− IBA1+ microglia, Fig. 6c. "

实体类型: 空间层级表型. PMID: 36856115.0, 文献标题: Single-cell RNA sequencing and spatial transcriptomics reveal cancer-associated fibroblasts in glioblastoma with protumoral effects, 期刊: The Journal of Clinical Investigation, 研究年份: 2023. 物种: human, 组织类型: brain/brain. 主要癌症类型: Brain cancer, 详细癌症类型: Glioblastoma (GBM). 主要空间层级: Cellular neighbourhoods, 具体空间结构名称: CAFs were enriched in the perivascular niche where glioblastoma stem cells (GSCs) reside, based on their proximity to endothelial cells. 组成细胞类型: Cancer-associated fibroblasts (CAFs), Glioblastoma stem cells (GSCs), Endothelial cells. 表型类型: Biological phenotype, 主要表型: Tumor Growth, 具体表型: Tumor growth. 发现技术: Spatial transcriptomics.验证技术类型: mouse models. 证据级别: mouse. 核心证据描述: "Spatial transcriptomics from 16 patient glioblastomas confirmed CAF proximity to mesenchymal glioblastoma stem cells (GSCs), endothelial cells, and M2 macrophages.
Supplementing GSC-derived xenografts with CAFs enhanced in vivo tumor growth.
Based on our spatial transcriptomics results (Figure 2, E–H), we hypothesized that GSCs may recruit CAFs to the perivascular niche of GBM.
Including CAFs with neurospheres enabled tumor growth to reach end point in most mice, which did not occur without CAFs (P = 0.03; Figure 7A), revealing that the tumor-promoting effects of 
CAFs on GSCs that we noted in culture also occurred in vivo. "

实体类型: 空间层级表型. PMID: 38805346.0, 文献标题: Spatial analysis of recurrent glioblastoma reveals perivascular niche organization, 期刊: JCI Insight, 研究年份: 2024. 物种: human, 组织类型: brain/brain. 主要癌症类型: Brain cancer, 详细癌症类型: glioblastoma. 主要空间层级: Spatial niche, 具体空间结构名称: niches surrounding the blood vessels. 组成细胞类型: ECs and fibroblasts
immune cells, glial cells, and fibroblasts，PVM，mesenchymal and OPC-like cells. 表型类型: Clinical phenotype, 主要表型: Tumor Recurrence, 具体表型: recurrence. 发现技术: immunofluorescence.验证技术类型: single-cell spatial transcriptomic. 证据级别: RNA. 核心证据描述: "-The most interesting was the organization of the niches surrounding the blood vessels in recurrent tumors. In these areas, niche 1, which is a vascular niche composed of ECs and fibroblasts, was surrounded by niche 7, enriched with immune cells, glial cells, and fibroblasts (Figure 5I). PVM cells of recurrent tumors were primarily found in this zone. These areas were also encapsulated by niches rich in mesenchymal and OPC-like cells (Figure 5H). No such structured organization was observed around vasculature of primary tumor samples.
-Of note, 2 different types of immune cells were associated with the blood vessels in recurrent tumor tissue: the perivascular macrophages (“PVM”), expressing CD68, CD14, CD74, and CD163, corresponding with CD163+ immunostaining, and the SPP1-, CCL7-, and CEACAM1-expressing cells (“Immune”)
-Recurrent samples were enriched in mesenchymal-like tumor cells (“MES”). We observed these MES cells arranging in spatial niches surrounding collagen-rimmed vessels (Figure 5H)."

实体类型: 空间层级表型. PMID: 38282415.0, 文献标题: Molecular features of luminal breast cancer defined
through spatial and single-cell transcriptomics, 期刊: Clinical and Translational Medicine, 研究年份: 2024. 物种: mouse, 组织类型: breast/breast. 主要癌症类型: Breast cancer, 详细癌症类型: breast cancer. 主要空间层级: Spatial niche, 具体空间结构名称: ST_2(‘proliferative’compartment) in four spatially distinct compartments within ER+ breast cancers.. 组成细胞类型: the MKI67+ cells (PNP, PPP, NPP and NNP) . 表型类型: Clinical phenotype, 主要表型: Overall Survival, 具体表型: significantly shorter survival. 发现技术: Spatial transcriptomics.验证技术类型: survival analysis. 证据级别: clinical data. 核心证据描述: "· Patients in the high score group of ST_2, ST_5 and ST_7 signatures had significantly shorter survival, suggesting that these populations were potentially associated with more aggressive features of ER+ breast cancers. 
· High ST_0（oestrogen-responsive population） and ST_2 scores were associated with better and worse survival outcomes, respectively (Figure S21), the same as those observed in the METABRIC dataset (Figure 7A)
· The results from these analysessuggest that the spatially distinct ST_2 group (including MKI67+ cells) had more impact than ST_0（oestrogen-responsive population） on luminal cancer prognose"

PMID: 37169743.0, 文献标题: Interferon-gamma is quintessential for NOS2 and COX2 expression in ER- breast tumors that lead to poor outcome, 期刊: Cell Death & Disease, 研究年份: 2023. 物种: human, 组织类型: breast/breast. 主要癌症类型: Breast tumors, 详细癌症类型: ER- breast tumors. 主要空间层级: Cell co-localization, 具体空间结构名称: interaction between NOS2hi tumor cells and CD8+ T cells. 组成细胞类型: NOS2hi tumor cells and CD8+ T cells. 表型类型: Biological phenotype, 主要表型: Tumor Metastasis, 具体表型: metastasis. 发现技术: Hematoxylin and Eosin (H&E) and mIF staining.验证技术类型: vitro scratch assay. 证据级别: cell. 核心证据描述: "NOS2hi regions were near stromarestricted CD8+ T cells.NOS2hi areas exhibited small tumor clusters that appeared to break away from the primary lesion (satellitosis), indicative of metastatic niches.
These results suggest that the upregulation of NOS2/COX2 tumor expression within an inflammatory niche could generate phenotypes with increased metastatic potential.
These earlier observations suggest that increased tumor NOS2 expression and clustering would generate a flux of NO that enhances the metastatic potential of exposed cells within that niche."

PMID: 37985817.0, 文献标题: Multiomic analysis of cervical squamous cell carcinoma identifies cellular ecosystems with biological and clinical relevance, 期刊: nature genetics, 研究年份: 2023. 物种: human, 组织类型: Cervix/Cervix. 主要癌症类型: Cervical cancer, 详细癌症类型: Cervical squamous cell carcinoma (CSCC). 主要空间层级: Cell co-localization, 具体空间结构名称: interaction between MP6 tmalignant squamous cells and CAF-MMP11 fibroblast cells. 组成细胞类型: MP6 tmalignant squamous cells and CAF-MMP11 fibroblast cells. 表型类型: Biological phenotype, 主要表型: Immune Suppression, 具体表型: Immunosuppression. 发现技术: Spatial transcriptome.验证技术类型: cell culture. 证据级别: cell. 核心证据描述: "CAF-MMP11 cells exhibited high levels of LRRC15 (Fig. 5f), whose presence was directly linked to the inhibitory effect on the antitumor immune response.
Fibroblasts neighboring MP6 tumor cells exhibited elevated immunosuppressive CAF signatures (Fig. 5g, left). Meanwhile, CytoSPACE revealed that fibroblast cells surrounding MP6, especially in the tumor–stroma border region, are predominantly CAF-MMP11.
Thus, TGFβ production and downstream signaling in MP6 tumors are at least partly mediated through FABP5.
Strikingly, the induction of TGFβ-inducible genes by the conditioned medium was found to be markedly decreased in ko-FABP5 cells (Fig. 7i). These results indicate that MP6 tumors produce FABP5-dependent TGFβ activity promoting CAF state transition to drive immune exclusion."

实体类型: 空间层级表型. PMID: 36669472.0, 文献标题: Multiplexed 3D atlas of state transitions and immune interaction in colorectal cancer, 期刊: cell, 研究年份: 2023. 物种: human, 组织类型: colon/colon. 主要癌症类型: Colorectal cancer, 详细癌症类型: CRC. 主要空间层级: Spatial niche, 具体空间结构名称: tumor buds. 组成细胞类型: budding cells. 表型类型: Biological phenotype, 主要表型: Tumor Invasion, 具体表型: Invasion, EMT-like transitions. 发现技术: H&E, cyclic immunofluorescence(CyCIF).验证技术类型:  scRNA-seq,GeoMx transcriptomics. 证据级别: RNA and Protein. 核心证据描述: "We conclude that EMT-like transitions and TB in CRC1 is characterized not by the formation of isolated spheres of cells, as first described by Weinberg and colleagues in tissue culture, but instead by the formation of large fibrillar structures that appear to be small buds when viewed in cross-section at their distal tips. Fibrils can invade into several different environments, including stroma and mucin, and we speculate that their formation is driven by a gradual (not abrupt) breakdown in cell adhesion associated with a graded EMT-like transition (Figure 5F)"

实体类型: 空间层级表型. PMID: 36669472.0, 文献标题: Multiplexed 3D atlas of state transitions and immune interaction in colorectal cancer, 期刊: cell, 研究年份: 2023. 物种: human, 组织类型: colon/colon. 主要癌症类型: Colorectal cancer, 详细癌症类型: CRC. 主要空间层级: Tissue structure, 具体空间结构名称: TLS networks. 组成细胞类型: B cells (CD20+), T cells (CD8+, CD45RO+, FOXP3+), macrophages (CD68+, CD163+), myeloid cells (PDL1+). 表型类型: Clinical phenotype, 主要表型: Drug Response, 具体表型: good prognosis and immune checkpoint inhibitor (ICI) responsiveness. 发现技术: H&E, cyclic immunofluorescence(CyCIF).验证技术类型:  cyclic immunofluorescence(CyCIF). 证据级别: Protein. 核心证据描述: "From these data, we conclude that our single 3D reconstruction of a TLS in CRC1 is a reasonable exemplar of our overall cohort in showing that: (1) TLSs form interconnected 3D networks rather than the isolated structures observed in 2D sections, (2) TLS networks within a single tumor can have different cellular compositions, and (3) variation in cell types and functional markers within a single large TLS network is graded, implying intra-TLS patterning and communication."

实体类型: 空间层级表型. PMID: 37344903.0, 文献标题: Interactions between MFAP5+fbroblasts and tumor-infltrating myeloid cells shape the malignant microenvironment of colorectal cancer, 期刊: Journal of Translational Medicine, 研究年份: 2023. 物种: human, 组织类型: colon/colon. 主要癌症类型: Colorectal cancer, 详细癌症类型: colorectal cancer. 主要空间层级: Cell co-localization, 具体空间结构名称: Interactions between MFAP5+ fibroblasts and C1QC+ macrophages. 组成细胞类型: MFAP5+ fibroblasts, C1QC+ macrophages. 表型类型: Clinical phenotype, 主要表型: Overall Survival, 具体表型: poor prognosis. 发现技术: Spatial transcriptomics, multiplex immunohistochemistry (mIHC).验证技术类型: survival analysis. 证据级别: clinical data. 核心证据描述: "We observed that MFAP5+fbro blasts mainly infiltrated fibroblast areas that were close to M2-phenotype macrophages (marked by CD68 and CD163) but opposite to anti-tumor T cells or B cells (Fig. 3C and Additional file 1: Fig. S5).
the mIHC assay confirmed the co-localization of MFAP5+fbroblasts and C1QC+macrophages within the tumor regions. In contrast, there were few C1QC+macrophages around the MFAP5+fbroblasts in normal tissues, suggesting that crosstalk between these cells mainly occurred in tumor tissues (Fig. 4H and Additional file 1: Fig. S8)
We assessed the clinical value of C1QC+macrophages in four independent CRC cohorts. We observed that patients with low infiltration of MFAP5+fbroblasts and high levels of C1QC+macrophages experienced better prognoses. In contrast, patients with high expression of both cell types demonstrated poor outcomes in the three cohorts (Fig. 4I).
we observed that compared with the MFAP5+ fibroblastshigh and C1QC+ macrophageshigh groups, patients with lower MFAP5+fbroblast infiltration and higher C1QC+macrophage infiltration demonstrated better prognoses (Additional file 1: Fig. S11). "

实体类型: 空间层级表型. PMID: 38833783.0, 文献标题: GJA4 expressed on cancer associated fibroblasts (CAFs)—A ‘promoter’ of the mesenchymal phenotype, 期刊: Translational Oncology, 研究年份: 2024. 物种: human, 组织类型: colon/colon. 主要癌症类型: Colorectal cancer, 详细癌症类型: Colorectal cancer (CRC). 主要空间层级: Tissue structure, 具体空间结构名称: an immune-excluded desmoplasic barrier. 组成细胞类型: GJA4+ fibroblasts, M2 macrophages. 表型类型: Biological phenotype, 主要表型: Immune Exclude, 具体表型: immune exclude. 发现技术: spatial transcriptomic.验证技术类型: Immunofluorescence. 证据级别: protein. 核心证据描述: "Score points for each cluster of GJA4+ fibroblast or M2 macrophage signatures estimated by ‘xCell’ algorithm highlighted clusters of GJA4+ fibroblasts and M2 macrophages co-localizing at the same point and wrapping around epithelial cells to prevent CD8+ T cell infiltration (Fig. 5E-F).
In addition, the signature score of GJA4+ fibroblasts and M2 macrophages showed significantly positive correlation (Fig. 5I-J, R = 0.342, P < 0.001; R = 0.230, P < 0.001).
Immunofluorescence labeling further demonstrated that GJA4+ fibroblasts mediated the above ‘immune-excluded’ phenomenon. We observed that CD8+ T cells infiltrated the tumor tissue periphery, and GJA4 appeared to hinder them entry into the central tumor area (Fig. 5M).
Taken together, our results suggest GJA4+ fibroblasts may act synergistically with M2 macrophages to limit immune cells infiltration into the tumor core by stimulating the formation of an immune-excluded desmoplasic barrier. "

实体类型: 空间层级表型. PMID: 36806082.0, 文献标题: Reconstruction of the tumor spatial microenvironment along the malignant-boundary-nonmalignant axis, 期刊: nature communications, 研究年份: 2023. 物种: human, 组织类型: colon/colon. 主要癌症类型: Colorectal cancer, 详细癌症类型: colorectal cancer. 主要空间层级: Tissue structure, 具体空间结构名称: a structural boundary generated by Macro-SPP1 and Fib-APSN localized around the tumor . 组成细胞类型: SPP1+ macrophage,APSN+ fibroblast and PLVAP + endothelial cells. 表型类型: Clinical phenotype, 主要表型: Immune Exclude, 具体表型: Worse prognosis and tumor immune exclusion. 发现技术: Spatial transcriptomics.验证技术类型: Survival analysis. 证据级别: cell. 核心证据描述: "There was a high fibroblast, macrophage, and endothelial cell component at the tumor boundary, suggestive of cellular composition commonalities in tumor boundaries.
We examined the expression of CD3-encoding genes of the IDC tissue and found consistency with the CD3 fluorescence (Supplementary Fig. 4k).This suggests the tumor boundary acts as a barrier, lymphocytes such as T and B cells are restricted from infiltrating into the malignant region, thus a microenvironment of immune exclusion is formed.
Macro-SPP1 and Fib-APSN are preferentially enriched in the tumor boundary, which exhibited stronginteractions with each other and significantly with tumor cells.
We examined the distribution of T cell infiltration and found that killer T cells (T-KLRB1) were significantly enriched outside malignant regionswhile exhausted T cells (T-HAVCR2) were enriched at the tumor boundary (Fig. 5i); the infiltration of these cells is limited to the malignant region.
we performed survival analysis and observed that high ieScore was associated with worse overall survival (log-rank test, p = 0.039) and progression-free survival (log-rank test, p = 0.04, Fig. 5k). "

PMID: 35365629.0, 文献标题: Single-cell and spatial analysis reveal interaction of FAP+ fibroblasts and SPP1+ macrophages in colorectal cancer, 期刊: Nat Commun, 研究年份: 2022. 物种: Human, 组织类型: Gut/Colorectum. 主要癌症类型: Colorectal cancer, 详细癌症类型: Colorectal Cancer. 主要空间层级: Cellular neighbourhoods, 具体空间结构名称: Desmoplastic structure formation. 组成细胞类型: FAP+ fibroblasts, SPP1+ macrophages. 表型类型: Clinical phenotype, 主要表型: Overall Survival, 具体表型: Shorter survival. 发现技术: spatial transcriptome.验证技术类型: H-score system in tissue microarray. 证据级别: clinical data. 核心证据描述: "We found that the FAP+ fibroblasts and SPP1+ macrophages were the most highly correlated populations across all examined cohorts. Patients with both high FAP+ fibroblasts and SPP1+ macrophages exhibited the shortest PFS compared with the signature combination groups, suggesting that these two cell types can synergistically promote tumor progression.
Then, we assessed the protein expression levels by the H-score system in tissue microarray (TMA) of 78 CRC patients to identify FAP and SPP1 both specifically increased in tumor tissue compared with adjacent normal tissue (Fig. 5d, e) and found patients with high protein levels of FAP or SPP1 enrolled in this TMA cohort exhibited shorter OS"

PMID: 39029466.0, 文献标题: Lymphatic-localized Treg-mregDC crosstalk limits antigen trafficking and restrains anti-tumor immunity, 期刊: Cancer Cell, 研究年份: 2024. 物种: human, 组织类型: Gut/Colorectum. 主要癌症类型: Colorectal cancer, 详细癌症类型: colorectal cancer and colorectal polyp. 主要空间层级: Spatial niche, 具体空间结构名称: Treg-mregDC-lymphatic niche. 组成细胞类型: Tregs and mregDCs. 表型类型: Biological phenotype, 主要表型: Drug Response, 具体表型: impeding the initiation of antitumor adaptive immune responses. 发现技术: scRNA;immunofluorescence.验证技术类型:  spatial transcriptomic. 证据级别: protein,mouse. 核心证据描述: "These tdTomato-marked mregDCs were closely associated with Tregs in the peri-lymphatic region, forming what we now recognize as a Treg-mregDC-lymphatic niche (Figure 3B and Video S2).
Collectively, these findings suggest that the crosstalk between Tregs and mregDCs fosters a highly activated state in Tregs and thus enhances their suppressive functions within the TME.

Within this comprehensive examination, we identified a total of ten TCGA cohorts, particularly kidney renal clear cell carcinoma (KIRC) and rectum adenocarcinoma (READ), where individuals with lower expression levels of activated Treg gene signature showed substantial survival advantages compared to those bearing the actTreghigh mregDChigh signatures (Figures 7F andS8E)."

实体类型: 空间层级表型. PMID: 372541.26, 文献标题: Spatial analysis of stromal signatures  identifes invasive front carcinoma-associated fbroblasts as suppressors of anti-tumor immune response in esophageal cancer, 期刊: Journal of Experimental &
Clinical Cancer Research, 研究年份: 2023. 物种: human, 组织类型: esophageal/esophageal. 主要癌症类型: Esophageal cancer, 详细癌症类型: esophageal squamous cell carcinoma (ESCC). 主要空间层级: Tissue structure, 具体空间结构名称: a fibrous barrier. 组成细胞类型: α‑SMA+ CAFs and CD163+ MØs. 表型类型: Biological phenotype, 主要表型: Immune Infiltration, 具体表型: blocks tumor‑infltrating immune cells. 发现技术: IMC.验证技术类型: Immunohistochemical. 证据级别: protein. 核心证据描述: "the abundance of α-SMA+ CAFs correlated with CD163+ MØs, in addition, we observed significantly positive correlations among α-SMA+ CAFs, CD163+ MØs and antitumor immune cells (i.e. CTLA4, FOXP3, CD4 and CD8 T cells, Fig.  1E-G).
The histopathological features of tumor tissue with or without α-SMA+ CAFs in the leading-edge area were further characterized, and showed that the presence of α-SMA+ CAFs at the invasive front form a fibrous barrier with CD163+ MØs to hinder immunologic effector cell infiltration (such as granzyme B+ immune cells, CD4+and CD8+ T cells), whereas the absence of α-SMA+ CAFs in the leading-edge area was associated with high intratumoral immune infiltration"

PMID: 39215354.0, 文献标题: Re-analysis of single cell and spatial transcriptomics data reveals B cell landscape in gastric cancer microenvironment and its potential crosstalk with tumor cells for clinical prognosis, 期刊: Journal of Translational Medicine, 研究年份: 2024. 物种: human, 组织类型: gastric/gastric. 主要癌症类型: Gastric cancer, 详细癌症类型: gastric cancer (GC). 主要空间层级: Cell co-localization, 具体空间结构名称: LAMA‑CD44 crosstalk between tumor cells and B cells. 组成细胞类型: Tumor epithelial cells, B cells. 表型类型: Clinical phenotype, 主要表型: Overall Survival, 具体表型: Poor survival. 发现技术: Spatial transcriptomics (ST).验证技术类型: Survival analysis. 证据级别: clinical data. 核心证据描述: "In order to further select reliable L/R pairs between tumor cells and B cells, we evaluated their expression levels in tissue slices using ST data analysis. Based on the expression and biological localization analysis of L/R pairs, we identified four pairs of L/R pairs (LAMA3/CD44, MDK/SDC1 (Fig.5F), CCL28/CCR10, and GDF/TGFBR2 (sFig.7A,B)) with high reliability between tumor cells and B cells and these L/Rs were also observed in tumor epithelial cells and B cells (Fig.5G, H).
Also, in two large immunotherapy cohorts (CheckMate (n=250), and IMvigor210 (n=298)), LAMA/CD44 pairs were associated with poor prognosis.
LAMA/CD44 pairs had a higher AUC value (average 0.7), indicated that the LAMA/CD44 axis might be a potential immunotherapy prediction marker for GC immunotherapy. LAMA/CD44 in the TCGA-STAD cohort was also associated with poor disease-free survival (DFS) (P=0.026), and in multiple immunotherapy cohorts, LAMA/CD44 pair was also associated with poor OS. "

PMID: 39215354.0, 文献标题: Re-analysis of single cell and spatial transcriptomics data reveals B cell landscape in gastric cancer microenvironment and its potential crosstalk with tumor cells for clinical prognosis, 期刊: Journal of Translational Medicine, 研究年份: 2024. 物种: human, 组织类型: gastric/gastric. 主要癌症类型: Gastric cancer, 详细癌症类型: gastric cancer (GC). 主要空间层级: Cell co-localization, 具体空间结构名称: LAMA‑CD44 crosstalk between tumor cells and B cells. 组成细胞类型: Tumor epithelial cells, B cells. 表型类型: Clinical phenotype, 主要表型: Drug Response, 具体表型: no response to immunotherapy. 发现技术: Spatial transcriptomics (ST).验证技术类型: clinical data analysis. 证据级别: clinical data. 核心证据描述: "In order to further select reliable L/R pairs between tumor cells and B cells, we evaluated their expression levels in tissue slices using ST data analysis. Based on the expression and biological localization analysis of L/R pairs, we identified four pairs of L/R pairs (LAMA3/CD44, MDK/SDC1 (Fig.5F), CCL28/CCR10, and GDF/TGFBR2 (sFig.7A,B)) with high reliability between tumor cells and B cells and these L/Rs were also observed in tumor epithelial cells and B cells (Fig. 5G, H).
As results shown in Fig. 6G, high LAMA/CD44 score suggested higher levels of immune infiltrating cells and immune modulators, indicated that high LAMA/CD44 was a relatively immunosuppressive microenvironment.
Subsequently, in GSE7961 (P=0.067), GSE19860 (P=0.013), Check Mate cohorts (P=0.072), Nathanso cohorts (P=0.038), and IMvigor210 cohorts (P=0.016), compared to immunotherapy non-responders (NR), immunotherapy responders (R) had lower LAMA/CD44 scores (Fig.6H-M) "

PMID: 39215354.0, 文献标题: Re-analysis of single cell and spatial transcriptomics data reveals B cell landscape in gastric cancer microenvironment and its potential crosstalk with tumor cells for clinical prognosis, 期刊: Journal of Translational Medicine, 研究年份: 2024. 物种: human, 组织类型: gastric/gastric. 主要癌症类型: Gastric cancer, 详细癌症类型: gastric cancer (GC). 主要空间层级: Cellular neighbourhoods, 具体空间结构名称: The co-localization and crosstalk between GC cells and B cells. 组成细胞类型: IgA plasma cells, tumor epithelial cells. 表型类型: Clinical phenotype, 主要表型: Drug Response, 具体表型: immunotherapy. 发现技术: Spatial transcriptomics (ST).验证技术类型: multiple immunofluorescence (mIF). 证据级别: protein. 核心证据描述: "The co-localization and crosstalk between GC cells and B cells significantly affect the efficacy of immunotherapy, and inhibiting the CCL28-CCR10 signal axis is a potential immunotherapy target for GC.
Therefore, we analyzed the cellular relationship between B cells and tumor cells in the GC microenvironment, and the results showed that CCL28 is mainly expressed by tumor cells, while CCR10 is mainly expressed in plasma cells as shown in Fig.2H, which might be one of the mechanisms underlying the abundance of IgA PCs in the GC microenvironment.
multiple immunofluorescence (mIF) also validated the CCL28-CCR10 axis difference between immune therapy responder (R) and non-responder (NR) (Fig.2I, sFig.2E).
Trough patient samples underwent immunotherapy, it was found that CCL28 mainly originated from tumor epithelial cells, while CCR10 and CD138 were co-located. At the same time, patients with high expression of CCL28 had more CD138+cells and a shorter survival time, while patients with low expression of CCL28 had a longer survival time. "

PMID: 38955417.0, 文献标题: Mapping the complexity and diversity of tertiary lymphoid structures in primary and peritoneal metastatic gastric cancer, 期刊: Journal for ImmunoTherapy of Cancer, 研究年份: 2024. 物种: human, 组织类型: gastric，peritoneal/gastric，peritoneal. 主要癌症类型: Gastric cancer, 详细癌症类型: gastric cancer. 主要空间层级: Tissue structure, 具体空间结构名称: Immature Tertiary Lymphoid Structures (iTLS). 组成细胞类型: Macrophages, regulatory T cells (Tregs), CD4+ T naive cells. 表型类型: Biological phenotype, 主要表型: Others, 具体表型: Antitumor effector. 发现技术: Spatial transcriptomics.验证技术类型: Immunohistochemistry. 证据级别: Protein. 核心证据描述: "TLSs in PM are immature and have immunosuppressive features.
These chemokines were not synonymously expressed. One cluster of mainly LA-expressed CCL2, CCL18, CCL19, and CCL21. A mixed cluster of mTLS and iTLS expressed CXCL13, CCL4, CCL5, CXCL10, and CXCL9, suggesting that these chemokines associate with distinct TLS states. Interestingly, these chemokines were exclusively expressed within CD45+ ROIs, and CCL19, CCL21 and CXCL13 even solely by TLS (online supplemental figure S2D).
Therefore, we analyzed the transcriptional programs in cancer cells (CK+ AOI; figure 2A) in tumors with mTLS and iTLS from both cohorts (figure 4G) and identified that cancer cells in tumors with mTLS have specifically enhanced expression of apoptosisrelated pathways. "
