PMID: 38955417.0, 文献标题: Mapping the complexity and diversity of tertiary lymphoid structures in primary and peritoneal metastatic gastric cancer, 期刊: Journal for ImmunoTherapy of Cancer, 研究年份: 2024. 物种: human, 组织类型: gastric，peritoneal/gastric，peritoneal. 主要癌症类型: Gastric cancer, 详细癌症类型: gastric cancer. 主要空间层级: Tissue structure, 具体空间结构名称: Mature Tertiary Lymphoid Structures (mTLS). 组成细胞类型: B memory cells, plasma cells, CD8+ T memory cells. 表型类型: Biological phenotype, 主要表型: Immune Suppression, 具体表型: Immunosuppression. 发现技术: Spatial transcriptomics.验证技术类型: Immunohistochemistry. 证据级别: Protein. 核心证据描述: "This was associated with higher levels of tumor-infiltrating macrophages and Tregs and less plasma cells compared with tumors with mature TLS. Furthermore, mature TLSs were characterized by overexpression of antitumor immune pathways such as B cell-related pathways, MHC class II antigen presentation while immature TLS were associated with protumor pathways, including T cell exhaustion and enhancement of DNA repair pathways in the corresponding cancer.
These chemokines were not synonymously expressed. One cluster of mainly LA-expressed CCL2, CCL18, CCL19, and CCL21. A mixed cluster of mTLS and iTLS expressed CXCL13, CCL4, CCL5, CXCL10, and CXCL9, suggesting that these chemokines associate with distinct TLS states. Interestingly, these chemokines were exclusively expressed within CD45+ ROIs, and CCL19, CCL21 and CXCL13 even solely by TLS (online supplemental figure S2D).
Thereby we identified that tumors with mTLS were enriched with tumor-infiltrating plasma cells and CD8+ T memory cells (figure 3D).
Therefore, we analyzed the transcriptional programs in cancer cells (CK+ AOI; figure 2A) in tumors with mTLS and iTLS from both cohorts (figure 4G) and identified that cancer cells in tumors with mTLS have specifically enhanced expression of apoptosisrelated pathways. "

PMID: 38906852.0, 文献标题: Multiomics integration-based immunological characterizations of adamantinomatous craniopharyngioma in relation to keratinization, 期刊: Cell Death and Disease, 研究年份: 2024. 物种: human, 组织类型: brain/hypothalamus. 主要癌症类型: Esophageal cancer, 详细癌症类型: adamantinomatous craniopharyngioma (ACP). 主要空间层级: Cell co-localization, 具体空间结构名称: Colocalization of TAM_GPNMB and RHCG+ terminally differentiated epithelial cells. 组成细胞类型: GPNMB+ Tumor-associated macrophages (TAMs), RHCG+ epithelial cells. 表型类型: Biological phenotype, 主要表型: Tumor Growth, 具体表型: Tumor growth. 发现技术: spatial transcriptomics.验证技术类型: asmFISH. 证据级别: protein. 核心证据描述: "Using spatial transcriptomic data, we observed one kind of non-microglial derived TAM that highly expressed GPNMB close to the terminally differentiated epithelial cell characterized by RHCG, and this colocalization was verified by asmFISH. We also found the positive correlation of infiltration between these two cell types in datasets with larger cohort. According to intercellular communication analysis, we report a regulatory network that could facilitate the keratinization of RHCG+ epithelial cells, eventually causing tumour progression.
Considering the functional crosstalk between the TAM_GPNMB and the E_C4 cluster, we compared the signature scores of TAM_GPNMB/E_C4. The results underscored the colocalization of TAM_GPNMB and E_C4 in the same spatial spot (Fig. 5O, P and S8A). Moreover, there was a most significant positive correlation between the signature score of these two clusters (Fig. 5Q, R and S8B–F).
By asmFISH, we confirmed the close spatial relationship between these two types of subclusters near keratins
in ACP (Fig. 6A). As the spatial distribution demonstrated a high correlation between TAM_GPNMB and the E_C4 cluster, we calculated the Spearman correlations for the proportion of cell infiltrations evaluated by CIBERSORTX in a larger cohort from the Gene Expression Omnibus (2 datasets with 39 ACP samples). "

PMID: 38614095.0, 文献标题: Macrophage-coated tumor cluster aggravateshepatoma invasion and immunotherapy resistance via generating local immune deprivation, 期刊: cell Reports Medicine, 研究年份: 2024. 物种: human, 组织类型: liver/liver. 主要癌症类型: Hepatocellular carcinoma, 详细癌症类型: HCC. 主要空间层级: Spatial niche, 具体空间结构名称: Macrophage-coated tumor cluster (MCTC). 组成细胞类型: macrophages, tumor cells. 表型类型: Clinical phenotype, 主要表型: Overall Survival, 具体表型: diminished recurrence-free survival and overall survival. 发现技术: multispectral
immunofluorescence (mIF).验证技术类型: mIF. 证据级别: protein. 核心证据描述: "Upon assessing MCTC structures in 253 HCC samples from two distinct TJMUCH cohorts, nearly one-third were classified as MCTC+ (51/133 in TJMUCH cohort I and 46/120 in TJMUCH cohort II). These patients exhibited markedly reduced RFS and OS in comparison to their MCTC counterparts (p < 0.05, Figure 1C). MCTCs were significantly linked to adverse RFS and OS via Cox univariate analysis and were further validated as an independent prognostic factor in multivariate models (p < 0.05, Table S2).
The distant metastasis rate of MCTC+ patients was significantly higher than those of MCTC- patients (Table S3). It is worth noting that the prognosis of MCTC+ patients was worse than MCTC- patients for both early- and advanced-stage HCC(Figure S2A)."

PMID: 38614095.0, 文献标题: Macrophage-coated tumor cluster aggravateshepatoma invasion and immunotherapy resistance via generating local immune deprivation, 期刊: cell Reports Medicine, 研究年份: 2024. 物种: human, 组织类型: liver/liver. 主要癌症类型: Hepatocellular carcinoma, 详细癌症类型: HCC. 主要空间层级: Spatial niche, 具体空间结构名称: Macrophage-coated tumor cluster (MCTC). 组成细胞类型: macrophages, tumor cells. 表型类型: Clinical phenotype, 主要表型: Drug Response, 具体表型: poor response to ICI therapy. 发现技术: multispectral
immunofluorescence (mIF).验证技术类型: mIF. 证据级别: protein. 核心证据描述: "Through a comprehensive immunomodu latory gene signature analysis18 conducted on 64 HCC samples from TJMUCH cohort III, it was revealed that MCTC+ HCC samples had significantly lower immunomodulatory signature scores compared to MCTC- samples (Figure 2A). This suggested a potential poor response to ICI therapy in MCTC+ HCC.
Clinical data from 28 patients with HCC undergoing ICI therapy (TJMUCH cohort IV) showed a marked difference in the objective response rate between MCTC+ and MCTC- groups(28.57% vs. 76.19%, respectively) (Figure 2B), indicating ICI resistance in MCTC+ HCC."

PMID: 38614095.0, 文献标题: Macrophage-coated tumor cluster aggravateshepatoma invasion and immunotherapy resistance via generating local immune deprivation, 期刊: cell Reports Medicine, 研究年份: 2024. 物种: human, 组织类型: liver/liver. 主要癌症类型: Hepatocellular carcinoma, 详细癌症类型: HCC. 主要空间层级: Spatial niche, 具体空间结构名称: Macrophage-coated tumor cluster (MCTC). 组成细胞类型: macrophages, tumor cells. 表型类型: Biological phenotype, 主要表型: Immune Suppression, 具体表型: immunosuppressive and pro-tumorigenic phenotype. 发现技术: scRNA-seq.验证技术类型: mIF. 证据级别: protein. 核心证据描述: "These macrophages are implicated in oncogenesis through their roles in facilitating immune evasion, providing nutrients, and meeting the metabolic needs of cancer cells. Comparative analysis revealed a significant  upregulation of these TAM subsets in macrophages of MCTC+ HCC tissues pointing to their heightened pro-tumorigenic potential (Figure 4E).
These results suggested that macrophages in MCTC+ HCC exhibited a distinct immunosuppressive and pro-tumorigenic phenotype.
Additionally, our analysis extended to Tregs (marked by Foxp3) and T cells with an exhausted phenotype (marked by CD39) within TJMUCH cohort IV tissues, which play a significant role in modulating immune responses within the TME. The results demonstrated that these cells were markedly elevated in MCTC+ tissues and exhibited a positive correlation with the proportion of Trem2+ macrophages (Figures S4C–S4F).
The results implied that Trem2+ macrophages in MCTC+ tissues might trigger the immunosuppressive microenvironment and diminish the anti-tumor efficacy of cytotoxic T cells by inducing Treg amplification and T cell exhaustion."

PMID: 38168935.0, 文献标题: Presence of onco-fetal neighborhoods in hepatocellular carcinoma is associated with relapse and response to immunotherapy, 期刊: nature cancer, 研究年份: 2023. 物种: human, 组织类型: liver/liver. 主要癌症类型: Hepatocellular carcinoma, 详细癌症类型: hepatocellular carcinoma. 主要空间层级: Spatial niche, 具体空间结构名称: onco-fetal niche. 组成细胞类型: POSTN+ CAFs, FOLR2+ TAMs, PLVAP+ Ecs. 表型类型: Biological phenotype, 主要表型: Tumor Recurrence, 具体表型: Relapse. 发现技术: Stereo-seq.验证技术类型: RNAscope. 证据级别: RNA. 核心证据描述: "In summary, our data suggest a model whereby onco-fetal cell types co-localize, forming a niche supporting their crosstalk and facilitating tumor cell escape from anti-tumor immunity, suggesting the importance of onco-fetal reprogramming in shaping HCC relapse."

PMID: 39067872.0, 文献标题: POSTN+ cancer-associated fibroblasts determine the efficacy of immunotherapy in hepatocellular carcinoma, 期刊: Journal for Immuno Therapy of Cancer, 研究年份: 2024. 物种: human, 组织类型: liver/liver. 主要癌症类型: Hepatocellular carcinoma, 详细癌症类型: Hepatocellular carcinoma (HCC). 主要空间层级: Tissue structure, 具体空间结构名称: a tumor immune barrier structure. 组成细胞类型: POSTN+ CAFs, CD8+ T cells. 表型类型: Clinical phenotype, 主要表型: Drug Response, 具体表型: no response to ICB therapy. 发现技术: spatial transcriptomic.验证技术类型: Multiplex immunohistochemistry (mIHC). 证据级别: protein. 核心证据描述: "To validate this finding, we assessed the correlation between the infiltration of POSTN+ CAFs and T-cell exclusion in three inde pendent cohorts downloaded from the Tumor Immune Dysfunction and Exclusion Database (http://tide.dfci. harvard.edu/) (figure 4B–D). Our findings revealed a significant positive correlation between the infiltration of POSTN+ CAFs and T cell exclusion.
Interestingly, our observations revealed that POSTN+ CAFs were responsible for excluding T cells from the malignant area within HCC tumor tissue sections(figure 4E)
Similar to the findings reported by Liu et al, POSTN+ CAFs formed a tumor immune barrier structure that excluded T cells in non-responders to ICB therapy but not in responders (figure 4F).
Furthermore, we performed mIHC staining to validate our findings. We observed significantly greater levels of POSTN+ CAFs with colocalization of POSTN and α-SMA protein expression in non-responders than in responders. Importantly, the colocalization of POSTN+ α-SMA+ CAFs correlated with the exclusion of CD8+ cells in non-responders (figure 4J), suggesting potential crosstalk between POSTN+ CAFs and CD8+ T cells associated with immunotherapy efficacy."

PMID: 39067872.0, 文献标题: POSTN+ cancer-associated fibroblasts determine the efficacy of immunotherapy in hepatocellular carcinoma, 期刊: Journal for Immuno Therapy of Cancer, 研究年份: 2024. 物种: human, 组织类型: liver/liver. 主要癌症类型: Hepatocellular carcinoma, 详细癌症类型: Hepatocellular carcinoma (HCC). 主要空间层级: Cell co-localization, 具体空间结构名称: Colocalization between POSTN+ CAFs and SPP1+ macrophages. 组成细胞类型: POSTN+ CAFs, SPP1+ macrophages. 表型类型: Biological phenotype, 主要表型: Immune Suppression, 具体表型: immunosuppressive. 发现技术: single cell RNA.验证技术类型: Multiplex immunohistochemistry (mIHC). 证据级别: protein. 核心证据描述: "In addition, the protein encoded by IL-6 bound to the receptors IL-6R, IL6ST, and THBD expressed on SPP1+ macrophages (figure 5G), while SPP1+ macrophages expressed high levels of IL-6R (figure 5H), suggesting that POSTN+ CAFs and SPP1+ macrophages may regulate the formation of an immunosuppressive environment via the IL-6/IL-6R axis.
We observed that HCC patients with high levels of POSTN+ CAFs and SPP1+ macrophages had the shortest OS (figure 6A), indicating synergistic promotion of tumor progression by these two cell types.
We overexpressed POSTN in CAFs and found that the ability of these cells to recruit macrophages was significantly greater than that of control CAFs (figure 6B,C). This recruitment phenomenon was also observed in HCC patient tissues (figure 6D).
Consistent with our previous findings, our mIHC results of HCC patient tissues revealed that IL-6 was mainly localized in POSTN+ CAFs, IL-6R was mainly localized in SPP1+ macrophages and that SPP1+ macrophages were also concentrated in the same region as POSTN+ CAFs (figure 6H). "

实体类型: 空间层级表型. PMID: 39067872.0, 文献标题: POSTN+ cancer-associated fibroblasts determine the efficacy of immunotherapy in hepatocellular carcinoma, 期刊: Journal for Immuno Therapy of Cancer, 研究年份: 2024. 物种: human, 组织类型: liver/liver. 主要癌症类型: Hepatocellular carcinoma, 详细癌症类型: Hepatocellular carcinoma (HCC). 主要空间层级: Cell co-localization, 具体空间结构名称: Colocalization between POSTN+ CAFs and SPP1+ macrophages. 组成细胞类型: POSTN+ CAFs, SPP1+ macrophages. 表型类型: Clinical phenotype, 主要表型: Drug Response, 具体表型: immunotherapy resistance. 发现技术: spatial transcriptomic.验证技术类型: Multiplex immunohistochemistry (mIHC). 证据级别: protein. 核心证据描述: "The analysis of survival data from the IMvigor210 dataset revealed that patients treated with anti-PD-L1 therapy who had high infiltration of POSTN+ CAFs or SPP1 macrophages exhibited worse OS than those without these features (figure 7A).
Interestingly, we observed stronger spatial colocalization between POSTN+ CAFs and SPP1+ macrophages in non-responders than in responders (figure 7D).
Similarly, mIHC staining revealed that non responders exhibited greater infiltration of POSTN+ CAFs or SPP1+ macrophages than responders (online supplemental figure S9). Bayespace-enhanced spatial data showed that most POSTN+ CAFs and SPP1+ macrophages were colocalized in the same region, whereas T cells or B cells were excluded from the tumor core (figure 7E) "

PMID: 35673582.0, 文献标题: Spatial maps of hepatocellular carcinoma transcriptomes reveal spatial expression patterns in tumor immune microenvironment, 期刊: Theranostics, 研究年份: 2022. 物种: human, 组织类型: liver/liver. 主要癌症类型: Hepatocellular carcinoma, 详细癌症类型: Hepatocellular carcinoma (HCC). 主要空间层级: Spatial niche, 具体空间结构名称: Immune Infiltration Enrichment (IIE) region with high CCL19 and CCL21. 组成细胞类型: T cells (CD3+), B cells (CD20+). 表型类型: Biological phenotype, 主要表型: Tumor Growth, 具体表型: inhibit the growth of HCC. 发现技术: flow cytometry.验证技术类型: Immunofluorescence. 证据级别: protein. 核心证据描述: "Flow cytometric analyses of tumor xenografts revealed a higher proportion of CD3 + cells and CD20 + cells in the oe-AAV group than in the control group (Figure 7G-H), and tissue immunofluorescence results confirmed significantly higher infiltration of CD3 + T cells and CD20 + B cells in the oe-AAV group (Figure 7I).
Taken together, these observations indicate that CCL19 and CCL21 inhibit the growth of HCC by enhancing the infiltration of tumor-infiltrating T cells and B cells. Thus, overexpression of Ccl19/Ccl21a AAV may be used as a novel strategy for immunotherapy of HCC, but further analysis is essential. "

PMID: 39138551.0, 文献标题: Spatial multiomics reveals a subpopulation of fbroblasts associated with cancer stemness in human hepatocellular carcinoma, 期刊: Genome Medicine, 研究年份: 2024. 物种: human, 组织类型: liver/liver. 主要癌症类型: Hepatocellular carcinoma, 详细癌症类型: Hepatocellular carcinoma (HCC). 主要空间层级: Spatial niche, 具体空间结构名称: F5-CAF niches associated with immune-excluded regions enriched for M2 macrophages. 组成细胞类型: F5-CAF, M2 macrophages. 表型类型: Biological phenotype, 主要表型: Immune Suppression, 具体表型: Immunosuppression. 发现技术: Spatial transcriptomics.验证技术类型: multiplexed immunofuorescence (mIF). 证据级别: protein. 核心证据描述: "For 8 HCC patients, F5-CAFs had a higher M2 macrophage score around them both in the tumor and at the interface (Fig. 5C).
we confirmed that more interactions between F5-CAF and M2 macrophages were detected compared with other fibroblasts, included CXCL12: CXCR4; LGALS9: COLEC12/ HAVCR2; ICAM1: aMb2 complex/ aXb2 complex (Additional fle2: Fig. S5E)
In the above mIF HCC samples, many F5-CAFs co-localized with CD14+CD206+ M2 macrophages in the interface (Additional fle2: Fig. S5F), which may be related to the expression trend of PD-L1 that we previously observed (Additional fle2: Fig. S4G).
Taken together, these results suggest that F5-CAFs may be associated with M2 macrophages and the immunosuppressive TME in HCC patients. "

PMID: 38355725.0, 文献标题: Innate and adaptive immune cell interaction drives inflammasome activation and hepatocyte apoptosis in murine liver injury from immune checkpoint inhibitors, 期刊: Cell Death & Disease, 研究年份: 2024. 物种: mouse, 组织类型: liver/liver. 主要癌症类型: Hepatocellular carcinoma, 详细癌症类型: HCC. 主要空间层级: Cellular neighbourhoods, 具体空间结构名称: zones of three-way interaction. 组成细胞类型:  adaptive immune cells, innate immune cells, and cC3+ hepatocytes. 表型类型: Biological phenotype, 主要表型: Drug Response, 具体表型: hepatocyte death in ILICI. 发现技术: IMC.验证技术类型: mouse models. 证据级别: mouse. 核心证据描述: "CD8 depletion by itself did not cause any liver injury or elevated liver enzymes (not shown), and confirmed depletion by FACS (Fig. 8B). Interestingly, CD8 depletion significantly protected against liver injury
These findings suggest that CD8 + T-cells are principal effectors of liver injury and cell death in ILICI.
We were able to observe zones of three-way interaction between adaptive immune cells, innate immune cells, and cC3+ hepatocytes, evidence that the interplay of adaptive and innate immunity plays a significant role in hepatocyte death in ILICI."

PMID: 38115703.0, 文献标题: Single-cell and spatial transcriptomics reveal POSTN+ cancer-associated fibroblasts correlated with immune suppression and tumour progression in non-small cell lung cancer., 期刊: Clin Transl Med, 研究年份: 2023. 物种: Human, 组织类型: Lung/Lung. 主要癌症类型: Lung cancer, 详细癌症类型: NSCLC. 主要空间层级: Cellular neighbourhoods, 具体空间结构名称: Surrounding tumour nests. 组成细胞类型: POSTN+CAFs, T cells, Cancer cell. 表型类型: Biological phenotype, 主要表型: Immune Infiltration, 具体表型: Lower infiltration of T cells. 发现技术: Spatial transcriptome.验证技术类型: mIHC. 证据级别: protein. 核心证据描述: "We found that POSTN+CAFs tended to encircle the tumour nests and infiltrated CD4+T cells and CD8+T cells located mostly in the stromal regions formed by multi-layers of POSTN+CAFs.
For example, in 10 POSTN-high tumour regions selected from a sample, seven of 10 (70%) regions had POSTN+ CAFs surrounding tumour nests, which might impede the infiltration of T cells, while tumour regions without POSTN+ CAFs had higher infiltration of T cells into the tumour bed"

PMID: 38581685.0, 文献标题: Spatial Architecture of Myeloid and T Cells Orchestrates Immune Evasion and Clinical Outcome in Lung Cancer, 期刊: cancer discovery, 研究年份: 2024. 物种: human, 组织类型: Lung/Lung. 主要癌症类型: Lung cancer, 详细癌症类型: lung cancer. 主要空间层级: Spatial niche, 具体空间结构名称: Spatial niches of T cells and macrophages in immune-hot adenocarcinomas. 组成细胞类型: T cells, Macrophages. 表型类型: Biological phenotype, 主要表型: Drug Response, 具体表型: favorable immune response. 发现技术: imc.验证技术类型: Wwhole-exome sequencing, RNA-seq data. 证据级别: RNA. 核心证据描述: "In immune-hot adenocarcinomas, spatial niches of T cells  and macrophages increased with clonal neoantigen burden, whereas such an increase was observed for niches of plasma and B cells in immune-excluded squamous cell carcinomas (LUSC).
In LUAD, clonal neoantigen burden was associated with community C6:macrophages and T cells (linear mixed-effects model, LME P   0.04), a community enriched in TS:TILMΦ high TMEs and depleted in TS:Immune low TMEs (Fig. 3A–C).
We next sought to establish the spatial immune context associated with HLA LOH and other somatic disruptions to HLA class I APM genes, hereafter referred to as class I/APM disruption (Methods). In LUAD, tumor regions with class I/APM disruption had increased densities of communities C6:macrophages and T cells and C7:macrophage enriched (LME P   0.001, LME P  0.023; Supplementary Fig. S6D)."

实体类型: 空间层级表型. PMID: 38581685.0, 文献标题: Spatial Architecture of Myeloid and T Cells Orchestrates Immune Evasion and Clinical Outcome in Lung Cancer, 期刊: cancer discovery, 研究年份: 2024. 物种: human, 组织类型: Lung/Lung. 主要癌症类型: Lung cancer, 详细癌症类型: lung cancer. 主要空间层级: Spatial niche, 具体空间结构名称: niches of plasma and B cell. 组成细胞类型: plasma, B cell. 表型类型: Biological phenotype, 主要表型: Drug Response, 具体表型: favorable immune response. 发现技术: imc.验证技术类型: WES, and RNA-seq data. 证据级别: RNA. 核心证据描述: "whereas such an increase was observed for niches of plasma and B cells in immune-excluded squamous cell carcinomas (LUSC).
In both LUAD and LUSC, densities of the community C9:B cells and plasma cells and plasma cells, when tested separately, were associated with a high tumor mutational burden (TMB).
In LUSC, the burden of expressed clonal and total neoantigens predicted to bind intact HLA alleles was correlated withC9:B cells and plasma cells (LME P  0.03), a community enriched in T:TILMΦ excluded TMEs and depleted in TS:Neutrophil high TMEs (Fig. 3A, B, and D).
Both B cells and plasma cells were enriched in community C9:B cells and plasma cells, but only stroma-localized plasma cell densities were significantly correlated with clonal and total neoantigen burden in LUSC (Supplementary Figs. S3F and S6A). This spatial analysis reveals that plasma cells and the community in which they reside are associated not only with high TMB but also with the burden of clonal and total neoantigens in early-stage LUSC."

PMID: 39187937.0, 文献标题: The co-location of CD14+APOE+ cells and MMP7+ tumour cells contributed to worse immunotherapy response in non-small cell lung cancer, 期刊: clinical and translational medicine, 研究年份: 2024. 物种: human, 组织类型: lung/lung. 主要癌症类型: Lung cancer, 详细癌症类型: non-small cell lung cancer. 主要空间层级: Cell co-localization, 具体空间结构名称: Co-location of CD14+APOE+ cells and MMP7+ tumor cells. 组成细胞类型: CD14+APOE+ macrophages, MMP7+ tumor cells. 表型类型: Clinical phenotype, 主要表型: Drug Response, 具体表型: worse therapeutic outcomes. 发现技术: Bulk RNA-seq, single-cell RNA-seq.验证技术类型: multiplex immunofluorescence. 证据级别: protein. 核心证据描述: "The connection between MMP7 and CD14 was 0.2, whereas the correlation between MMP7 and APOE was 0.47. This suggests that MMP7 is more closely linked to the APOE+ subset of CD14+ cells (Figure 5A,B).
Our findings align with the transcriptomics study, as we detected the presence of MMP7+ tumour cells and CD14+APOE+ cells in the NSCLC tumour region (Figure 5C). 
Notably, CD14+APOE+ cells were predominantly located in areas with high MMP7+ tumour cells, suggesting a strong colocalisation pattern between MMP7+ tumour cells and CD14+APOE+ cells (Figure 5D).
The expression of MMP7 in tumour cells and APOE in myeloid cells was higher in non-responder (NR) patients compared to responders (R) (Figure 5E).
MMP7 and APOE were both more enriched in NR in patients treated with immunotherapy (Figure 6F,G).
We found that patients with higher levels of MMP7 or APOE had significantly worse therapeutic outcomes (Figure 6H,I). "

PD-1+ CD8+ T cells. 表型类型: Biological phenotype, 主要表型: Others, 具体表型:  Vascular structure was complete or deformed and irregular. 发现技术: NanoString nCounter 289 Panel.验证技术类型: IMC. 证据级别: protein. 核心证据描述: " Furthermore, a positive correlation was found between a higher angiogenesis score and the scattered pattern, while a lower immune score was noted for several immune-related parameters, including total TILs, T-cell markers, and T-effector score (Fig. 5B).
Additionally, the vascular structure was complete, with antigen-specific PD-1+ CD8+ T cells visible within the CD31+ vasculature (the polarized pattern). 
furthermore, disorderly arrangement of PDPN+ fibroblasts and CD68+macrophages was observed (especially in the scattered pattern), and vasculature was deformed and irregular (especially in the scattered pattern), which consistent with what NanoString panel observed (Figs. 5B, D and 6A, B)."

PMID: 38113419.0, 文献标题: Spatially Resolved Tumor Microenvironment Predicts Treatment Outcomes in Relapsed/Refractory Hodgkin Lymphoma, 期刊: American Society of Clinical Oncology, 研究年份: 2023. 物种: human, 组织类型: lympha/lympha. 主要癌症类型: Others, 详细癌症类型:  relapsed or refractory classic Hodgkin lymphoma(r/r CHL). 主要空间层级: Spatial niche, 具体空间结构名称:  unique architecture defined by CXCR5+ HRS cells and their strong spatial relationship with
CXCL131 macrophages. 组成细胞类型: CXCR5+ HRS cells, CXCL13+ macrophages. 表型类型: Biological phenotype, 主要表型: Tumor Recurrence, 具体表型: Relapsed/Refractory. 发现技术: a flow cytometry-based cell sorting;Single cell RNA sequencing.验证技术类型:  imaging mass cytometry (IMC);multicolor immunofluorescence (MC-IF). 证据级别: protein. 核心证据描述: "Therefore, we additionally performed scRNA-seq on CHL samples with enrichment of the HRS cell population by cell sorting (Data Supplement, Appendix Figs A5 and A9). Using the cell-to-cell communication tool, Cell Chat,21 we predicted CXCR5-CXCL13 interaction between CXCR51 HRS cells and CXCL131 macrophages (Fig 3A). This significant interaction was also validated by the alternative iTALK method22 (Fig 3B).
Therefore, to further describe the spatial relationship between CXCR51 HRS cells and CXCL131 macrophages, we applied MC-IF to the discovery cohort TMA that was used for IMC. Consistent with the results of the scRNA-seq-based cell-to-cell interaction prediction, we observed a strong positive correlation of the abundance of CXCR51 HRS cells with CXCL131 macrophages in the MC-IF data (Fig 3C).
We identified the interaction of CXCR51 HRS cells with ligand-expressing CXCL131 macrophages as a prominent crosstalk axis in relapsed CHL."

PMID: 37451271.0, 文献标题: A distinct stimulatory cDC1 subpopulation amplifies CD8+ T cell responses in tumors for protective anti-cancer immunity, 期刊: Cancer Cell, 研究年份: 2023. 物种: human, 组织类型: mucosa/mucisa. 主要癌症类型: Others, 详细癌症类型: head and neck squamous cell carcinoma (HNSCC). 主要空间层级: Cellular neighbourhoods, 具体空间结构名称: cDC1-CD8+ T cell clusters. 组成细胞类型: Type 1 conventional dendritic cells (cDC1),CD8+ T cells. 表型类型: Clinical phenotype, 主要表型: Overall Survival, 具体表型: positively associated with progression-free patient survival. 发现技术:  immunofluorescence.验证技术类型: survival analysis. 证据级别: clinical data. 核心证据描述: "This prompted us to assess whether these observations were related to patient outcome for our HNSCC cohort. We found that the presence of intratumoral clusters between MHCIIhiCCR7neg cDC1 and CD8+ T cells was positively associated with progression-free patient survival (Figures 8E and 8F), arguing that the interplay between MHCIIhiCCR7neg cDC1 and CD8+ T cells in tumors has favorable consequences for anti-cancer immunity."

PMID: 38670097.0, 文献标题: Targeting PDGF signaling of cancer-associated fibroblasts blocks feedback activation of HIF-1αand tumor progression of clear cell ovarian cancer, 期刊: Cell Reports Medicine, 研究年份: 2024. 物种: human, 组织类型: Ovarian/Ovarian. 主要癌症类型: Ovarian cancer, 详细癌症类型: Ovarian clear cell carcinoma (OCCC). 主要空间层级: Spatial niche, 具体空间结构名称: HIF-1a-induced cancer cells reside near CAFs. 组成细胞类型: HIF-1α-positive cancer cell, myofibroblastic CAFs(myCAFs). 表型类型: Clinical phenotype, 主要表型: Drug Response, 具体表型: Chemoresistance. 发现技术: spatial transcriptomics, Immunofluorescence.验证技术类型: co-culture, mouse model. 证据级别: cell,mouse. 核心证据描述: "Consistent with this, we found that the tissue distribution of cancer cells and CAFs depicted by Visium analyses corresponded approximately to the cancer cell- or CAF-dominated regions visualized by H&E staining (Figures 3A and S3A).
We observed that HIF-1a-positive cancer cells in chemoresistant tumors frequently localized near a-SMA-positive cells (Figures 3H and S4D).
These data suggest that localization of HIF-1a-induced cancer cells near CAF is a hallmark of chemoresistant OCCC.
These data strongly suggest that interactions between cancer cells and CAFs lead to formation of a chemoresistant niche in OCCC.
We find that a chemoresistant OCCC subpopulation with elevated HIF activity localizes mainly in areas populated by cancer-associated fibroblasts (CAFs) with a myofibroblastic phenotype, which is corroborated by quantitative immunostaining.
Indeed, we observed a marked reduction in a fraction of HIF-1a-positive cancer cells (Figures 7G and 7H) as well as a-SMA-positive CAFs (Figure S8E) after treatment."

PMID: 39075108.0, 文献标题: CTHRC1+ fbroblasts and SPP1+ macrophages synergistically contribute to pro tumorigenic tumor microenvironment in pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma, 期刊: scientific reports, 研究年份: 2024. 物种: human, 组织类型: Pancreas/Pancreas. 主要癌症类型: Pancreatic cancer, 详细癌症类型: Pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma. 主要空间层级: Cell co-localization, 具体空间结构名称: Co-localization of SPP1+ APOE+ tumor-associated macrophages (TAM) and CTHRC1+ GREM1+ cancer-associated myofbroblasts (myCAF). 组成细胞类型: CTHRC1+GREM1+ myCAF, SPP1+APOE+ TAM. 表型类型: Clinical phenotype, 主要表型: Overall Survival, 具体表型: worse prognosis. 发现技术: Single-cell RNA-seq.验证技术类型: Spatial transcriptomics. 证据级别: clinical data. 核心证据描述: "Survival analysis of CTHRC1 and SPP1 gene expression in PAAD demonstrated that patients with high expression of these genes led to worse survival (Fig. 5c), demonstrating the pro-tumor functions of these genes in the clinical context. Furthermore, the combined gene signature of both groups also resulted in 
worse prognosis for patients, as well as being enriched in tumor populations (Fig. 5c, d).
These results highlight the pro-tumorigenic and positive correlation of CTHRC1+GREM1+ myCAF and SPP1+APOE+ TAM in the TME in single-cell resolution. Next, we aimed to demonstrate their relationship using spatial transcriptomics, amplifying research significance if found to be consistent with single cell transcriptomics.
Since all three groups of fibroblasts, macrophages, and tumor cells were identified in close proximity to each other (Fig.6a), we then quantitatively visualized these spatial localizations with a proximity enrichment heatmap (Fig.6e), showing that CTHRC1+GREM1+ myCAF were only in relationship to SPP1+ TAM and tumor cells, while SPP1+TAM were in close proximity to tumor cells 
and also to immune cells. "

PMID: 36946782.0, 文献标题: Cell-autonomous Cxcl1 sustains tolerogenic circuitries and stromal inflammation via neutrophil-derived TNF in pancreatic cancer , 期刊: Cancer Discov, 研究年份: 2023. 物种: human, 组织类型: Pancreas/Pancreas. 主要癌症类型: Pancreatic cancer, 详细癌症类型: pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma (PDAC). 主要空间层级: Cellular neighbourhoods, 具体空间结构名称: CD8+ T-cells are spatially excluded from cellular neighborhoods comprising tumor-cell Cxcl1 and CXCR2+ PMN-MDSCs. 组成细胞类型: CD8+ T-cells，epithelial/tumor-cell (PanCK+)，PMN-MDSC（CXCR2+ neutrophilic myeloid-derived suppressor cells） (CD15+CXCR2+). 表型类型: Biological phenotype, 主要表型: Immune Suppression, 具体表型: Immunosuppression. 发现技术: IMC.验证技术类型: mouse models（1.Cxcl1 genetically silenced 2.transgenic CD8α−/− or in C57/BL6 mice treated with CD8
+ T-cell-depleting antibodies ）. 证据级别: mouse. 核心证据描述: "·Coupled with reduced tumor growth kinetics in subcutaneous KPC-Cxcl1KO tumors (n=5, Supplementary Fig. S5B), there was dramatic reduction in primary tumor weights (n=20, P<0.0001; Fig. 3A) and metastatic outgrowth (Supplementary Fig. S5C–D), as well as significant improvement in overall survival (n=15, median 48 vs. 21 days; P<0.0001, Fig. 3B), in orthotopically-injected KPC-Cxcl1 KO compared with KPCEV tumor-bearing mice.
·Monitoring of in vivo tumor growth dynamics using real-time ultrasound (Fig. 3J) revealed significantly reduced latency of KPC-Cxcl1 KO-mediated tumor control in transgenic CD8α−/− and anti-CD8-treated mice compared with vehicle-treated KPCCxcl1KO mice.
·Therefore, silencing of cell-intrinsic Cxcl1 overcomes T-cell exclusion and restrains tumor growth in a CD8+ T-cell-dependent manner in vivo"

PMID: 38658971.0, 文献标题: Single-cell transcriptomics reveal distinct immune-infiltrating phenotypes and macrophage–tumor interaction axes among different lineages of pituitary neuroendocrine tumors, 期刊: Genome Medicine, 研究年份: 2024. 物种: human, 组织类型: brain/Pituitary. 主要癌症类型: Brain cancer, 详细癌症类型: Pituitary neuroendocrine tumors (PitNETs). 主要空间层级: Cell co-localization, 具体空间结构名称: Interaction Between CX3CR1+ Macrophages and NR5A1+ Tumor Cells. 组成细胞类型: CX3CR1+ Macrophages, NR5A1+ Tumor Cells. 表型类型: Biological phenotype, 主要表型: Others, 具体表型: Apoptosis. 发现技术: single cell RNA, Spatial transcriptomics.验证技术类型: co-culture, Cell apoptosis. 证据级别: cell. 核心证据描述: "The results demonstrated that CX3CR1+, C1Q+, and GPNMB+ macrophages exhibited the highest interaction with NR5A1+, TBX19+, and POU1F1+ tumor cells, respectively (Fig. 5A).
We found that CX3CR1+ macrophages regulated NR5A1+ tumor cells through regulation of signaling receptor pathway and TGF-β stimulus (Fig.5D)
Notably, CX3CR1+ macrophages enriched NR5A1+ tumor cells and INHBA-ACVR1B were locationalized closely in the spatial transcriptome of SF1 lineage tissue (Fig. 6B–D and Additional fle1: Fig. S10A)
To confirm the role of INHBA on the CX3CR1+ macrophages NR5A1+ tumor cells interaction axis, we treated primary cells and PitNET cell lines with INHBA.
We found that INHBA inhibited cell viability in SF1 lineage primary cells (Fig. 6H) and induced apoptosis (Fig. 6I). "

PMID: 36281356.0, 文献标题: Multiplexed imaging mass cytometry reveals distinct tumor-immune microenvironments linked to immunotherapy responses in melanoma, 期刊: communications medicine, 研究年份: 2022. 物种: human, 组织类型: skin/skin. 主要癌症类型: Melanoma, 详细癌症类型: melanoma. 主要空间层级: Spatial niche, 具体空间结构名称: immune hot TMEs. 组成细胞类型:  strong infiltration of CD4+ T, B cells, HLA-DR+CD11c+ myeloid-derived cells, CD8+ T cells . 表型类型: Clinical phenotype, 主要表型: Drug Response, 具体表型: anti-PD-1 respond. 发现技术: imc,bulk RNA-seq.验证技术类型: imc. 证据级别: protein. 核心证据描述: "Overall, by dividing the clustering results into hot and cold categories, this clustering achieved a classification accuracy of 79.3% (46 out of 58 responder ROIs classified as immune hot) for responders and 95.1% (39 out of 41 nonresponder ROIs classified as immune cold) for nonresponders on the ROI level (Fig. 4b). Analysis further revealed that ROIs from a same patient were in most cases 
highly homogeneous: most patients had ROIs from only one or two archetypes of the same immune hot or cold category (Fig. 4b). Kaplan–Meier analysis revealed better overall survival (OS, P = 0.0093) and progression-free survival (PFS, P = 0.06) in patients defined as immune hot (Fig. 4e)."

PMID: 35406628.0, 文献标题: Mass Cytometric Analysis of Early-Stage Mycosis Fungoides, 期刊: cell, 研究年份: 2022. 物种: human, 组织类型: skin/skin. 主要癌症类型: Others, 详细癌症类型: Mycosis fungoides (MF). 主要空间层级: Cell co-localization, 具体空间结构名称: co-localization of CD4+ T cells with both CD1a+CD1c+ and CD1a- CD1c+ DCs in cellular aggregates just below the epidermis. 组成细胞类型: CD4+ T cells, CD1a+CD1c+ DCs, CD1a- CD1c+ DCs. 表型类型: Biological phenotype, 主要表型: Tumor Growth, 具体表型: Tumor growth. 发现技术: imaging mass cytometry.验证技术类型: imaging mass cytometry. 证据级别: protein. 核心证据描述: "We observed clusters of CD4+ T cells and multiple types of dendritic cells (DCs) identified through differential expression of CD11c, CD1a, and CD1c in the dermis. These results indicated substantial heterogeneity in the composition of the local immune infiltrate but suggest a prominent role for clustered CD4–DC interactions in disease pathogenesis. Probably, the local inhibition of such interactions may constitute an efficient treatment modality.
In addition, substantial numbers of CD4+ T cells co-localized with both CD1a+CD1c+HLA-DR+ and CD1a-CD1c+HLA-DR+ DCs in the dermis in situ. In this respect it is striking that the dominant presence of particular CD4+ T-cell clusters coincided with an elevated number of phenotypically distinct myeloid cells in some of the patients, suggesting that interactions between these CD4+ T cells and myeloid cells may play a prominent role in disease control."

these results suggest that Batf3+ DCs are needed at the effector phase for anti-PD-L1 efficacy because of the positive signals that these cells provide to the Ag-specific CD8+ T cells through the 4–1BB/4–1BBL axis,"

PMID: 35363540.0, 文献标题: Multiplexed imaging mass cytometry of the chemokine milieus in melanoma characterizes features of the response to immunotherapy, 期刊: SCIENCE IMMUNOLOGY, 研究年份: 2022. 物种: human, 组织类型: skin, lymph nodes (LNs)/skin, lymph nodes (LNs). 主要癌症类型: Melanoma, 详细癌症类型: metastatic melanoma. 主要空间层级: Spatial niche, 具体空间结构名称:  CXCL9 and CXCL10 milieus. 组成细胞类型: CXCL9/CXCL10-expressing cells, CD8+ T cells, Macrophages. 表型类型: Biological phenotype, 主要表型: Immune Suppression, 具体表型: T cell dysfunction. 发现技术: imaging mass cytometry.验证技术类型: imaging mass cytometry. 证据级别: RNA and Protein. 核心证据描述: "CXCL9 and CXCL10 were often localized in patches associated with dysfunctional T cells expressing the B lymphocyte chemoattractant CXCL13.
Comparing the frequencies of all individual chemokine-expressing cells across images revealed co-expression of the inflammatory response chemokines CXCL9, CXCL10, CCL4, and CXCL13 (fig. S8B).
CXCL9 and CXCL10 milieus were the most abundant, with close to half of all CXCL9-expressing cells and more than a third of all CXCL10-expressing cells being present in milieus. Markers for T cell exhaustion (Lag-3) and antigen experience (CCL4 and CXCL13) were particularly highly expressed in CXCL10 and CXCL9 milieus in comparison to other milieus, suggesting that they may represent hotspots of ongoing antitumor activity (Fig. 3D).
These CXCL9 and CXCL10 milieus exhibited high expression of markers of T cell dysfunction and exhaustion."

实体类型: 空间层级表型. PMID: 35363540.0, 文献标题: Multiplexed imaging mass cytometry of the chemokine milieus in melanoma characterizes features of the response to immunotherapy, 期刊: SCIENCE IMMUNOLOGY, 研究年份: 2022. 物种: human, 组织类型: skin, lymph nodes (LNs)/skin, lymph nodes (LNs). 主要癌症类型: Melanoma, 详细癌症类型: metastatic melanoma. 主要空间层级: Spatial niche, 具体空间结构名称: B cell follicles. 组成细胞类型: CXCL13+ CD8+ T cells, B cells, Follicular dendritic cells (HLA-DR+),TCF7+ naïve-like T cells. 表型类型: Biological phenotype, 主要表型: Drug Response, 具体表型: Responsive. 发现技术: imaging mass cytometry.验证技术类型: imaging mass cytometry. 证据级别: RNA and Protein. 核心证据描述: "Of note, because many of our samples were from LN metastases, we referred to structures that resemble B cell follicles or TLS within tumors as B cell follicles.
Our analysis revealed that in images with B cells, but no B cell follicles, the sole sources of CXCL13 were T cells, and the highest fractions of CXCL13+ /HLA-DR+ /CD68− cells (likely follicular dendritic cells between densely packed HLA-DR+ B cells, thus appearing as HLA-DR+) were observed in images with B cell follicles (Fig. 5D).
In agreement, TCF7+ T cell frequencies steadily increased in images ordered from those with no B cells to those with B cell follicles for both CD8+ T cells and CD4+ T cells with or without PD1 expression (Fig. 5F).
B cell patches and follicles were also enriched with TCF7+ naïve-like T cells, a cell type that is predictive of response to immune checkpoint blockade."

with positive response to ICIs.
We observed that antigen-experienced T cells were located significantly closer to melanoma cells in pretreatment tumors from ICI responders compared with nonresponders (P = 0.025) (Fig. 5F, left)."

PMID: 37164975.0, 文献标题: Spatially resolved multi-omics highlights cell-specific metabolic remodeling and interactions in gastric cancer, 期刊: Nature Communications, 研究年份: 2023. 物种: human, 组织类型: stomach/stomach. 主要癌症类型: Gastric cancer, 详细癌症类型: gastric cancer. 主要空间层级: Spatial niche, 具体空间结构名称: “tumor-normal interface” region. 组成细胞类型: Plasma B cell, Follicular B cell, Th2-like CD4+ T cells. 表型类型: Biological phenotype, 主要表型: Tumor Invasion, 具体表型: tumor cell invasion and progression. 发现技术: spatial transcriptome.验证技术类型: Immunohistochemical. 证据级别: protein. 核心证据描述: "Significantly, when we projected the cluster assignments back onto tissue section coordinates, we discovered a distinct “interface” cluster (cluster 9) at the junction of tumor and neighboring tissues (Fig. 6b).
An immune cell-dominated “tumor-normal interface” region where tumor cells contact adjacent tissues are characterized with distinct transcriptional signatures and significant immunometabolic alterations.
Most notably, although only very few amounts of tumor-infiltrating immune cells were identified in tumor tissue, we discovered that “interface” cluster 9 exhibits significant immune and inflammation-related signatures with plenty of plasma B cell, follicular B cell, and Th2-like CD4 + T cells.
Immunohistochemical staining of CD 20 and CD 38 on adjacent cancer sections were coincident with the defined plasma B cell- and follicular B cell-enriched cluster 9 region (Supplementary Fig. 42). Located at tumor boundary where the tumor contacts neighboring tissues, the immune and inflammation-related cluster 9 is believed to be important for tumor cell invasion and progression."

PMID: 38816233.0, 文献标题:  Interactions between LAMP3+ dendritic cells and T-cell subpopulations promote immune evasion in papillary thyroid carcinoma, 期刊: J Immunother Cancer, 研究年份: 2024. 物种: Human, 组织类型: Thyroid/Thyroid. 主要癌症类型: Thyroid cancer, 详细癌症类型: Papillary thyroid carcinoma. 主要空间层级: Spatial niche, 具体空间结构名称: Recruitment of LAMP3+ DCs by tumor cells promotes CD8+ T-cell exhaustion and Treg cell infiltration. 组成细胞类型: LAMP3+ DC, CD8+ T cell, Treg. 表型类型: Clinical phenotype, 主要表型: Tumor Growth, 具体表型: Progression. 发现技术: Spatial transcriptome.验证技术类型: mIHC, Immunohistochemistry . 证据级别: protein. 核心证据描述: "In general, the recruitment of LAMP3+ DCs by tumor cells through NECTIN3-NECTIN2 promotes CD8+ T-cell exhaustion and Treg cell infiltration, creating an immunosuppressive microenvironment. This ultimately leads to the clinical progression of PTC.
We confirmed the recruitment of LAMP3+ DCs (CCL17) on FOXP3_Treg (CCR4) using multiplex fluorescence assay in tissue specimens
Subsequently, we performed multiplex fluorescence staining using samples from non-progressive PTC and progressive PTC to validate our analysis results (figure 7G, online supplemental file 7). In Group B tumors, LAMP3+ DCs closely neighbored KRT19+ tumor cells, with a high degree of colocalization of LAMP3 with NECTIN2, KRT19, and NECTIN3, respectively, in sequence."

PMID: 38816233.0, 文献标题: Interactions between LAMP3+ dendritic cells and T-cell subpopulations promote immune evasion in papillary thyroid carcinoma, 期刊: Journal for Immuno Therapy of Cancer, 研究年份: 2024. 物种: human, 组织类型: thyroid/thyroid. 主要癌症类型: Thyroid cancer, 详细癌症类型: papillary thyroid cancer. 主要空间层级: Cell co-localization, 具体空间结构名称: interaction between LAMP3+DCs and T-cell subpopulations. 组成细胞类型: LAMP3+ dendritic cells, Tregs (regulatory T cells), CD8+ T cells. 表型类型: Biological phenotype, 主要表型: Immune Suppression, 具体表型: immunosuppressive. 发现技术: Spatial transcriptomics.验证技术类型: multiplex immunohistochemistry (mIHC). 证据级别: Protein. 核心证据描述: "Mapping LAMP3+ DC to spatial slices reveals its concentration in the tumor, with progressive PTC exhibiting a higher enrichment ratio that closely overlaps with the spatial distribution of T cells. This suggests a closer interaction between LAMP3+ DC and T cells in progressive PTC (figure 5H). In addition, spatial transcriptomics analysis showed higher immune tolerance scores in progressive PTC, with spots exhibiting higher tolerance scores aligning with T-cell distribution (figure 5I).
we found extensive cellular interactions involving LAMP3+ DCs, Treg cells, and CD8+ T cells, facilitated by inhibitory (NECTIN2-TIGIT, LAG3-HAVCR2) or costimulatory (ICOSL-ICOS and CD80/86-CD28) molecules, and chemokines (CXCL16-CXCR6 and CCL17-CCR4) (figure 6A).
Through multiplex immunofluorescence staining, we observed the colocalization of LAMP3-expressing DCs (identified by NECTIN2+) and CD8-expressing CD8+ T cells (identified by TIGIT+) in progressive PTC (figure 6E), which indicated the potential role of LAMP3+ DCs in inducing exhaustion in the recruitment of CD8+ T cells in progressive PTC.
We confirmed the recruitment of LAMP3+ DCs (CCL17) on FOXP3_Treg (CCR4) using multiplex fluorescence assay in tissue specimens (figure 6E) .
Extensive interactions between LAMP3+ DCs and T cells in PTC were found, suggesting that LAMP3+ DCs and T cells work together to shape the immunosuppressive microenvironment in progressive PTC, characterized by high infiltration of exhausted T cells and Treg cells. "

实体类型: 空间层级表型. PMID: 38816233.0, 文献标题: Interactions between LAMP3+ dendritic cells and T-cell subpopulations promote immune evasion in papillary thyroid carcinoma, 期刊: Journal for Immuno Therapy of Cancer, 研究年份: 2024. 物种: human, 组织类型: thyroid/thyroid. 主要癌症类型: Thyroid cancer, 详细癌症类型: papillary thyroid cancer. 主要空间层级: Spatial niche, 具体空间结构名称: recruitment of LAMP3+ DCs by tumor cells. 组成细胞类型: Tumor cells, LAMP3+ DCs. 表型类型: Biological phenotype, 主要表型: Tumor Growth, 具体表型: Tumor Progression. 发现技术: single cell RNA.验证技术类型: multiplex immunohistochemistry (mIHC). 证据级别: Protein. 核心证据描述: "Group A tumor cells display a more substantial recruitment effect on these cell types. Conversely, when LAMP3+ DCs acted as the signal recipient, Group B tumor cells demonstrated a significantly enhanced recruitment effect on LAMP3+ DCs (figure 7D). Furthermore, the interaction mediated by NECTIN3-NECTIN2, known to promote lymphocyte transendothelial migration, was notably strengthened between tumor cells and LAMP3+ DCs in this context42 (figure 7E,F). This finding suggests that Group B tumor cells have a greater tendency to recruit LAMP3+ DCs conducive to establishing an immunosuppressive microenvironment.
Subsequently, we performed multiplex fluorescence staining using samples from non-progressive PTC and progressive PTC to validate our analysis results (figure 7G, online supplemental file 7). In Group B tumors, LAMP3+ DCs closely neighbored KRT19+ tumor cells, with a high degree of colocalization of LAMP3 with NECTIN2, KRT19, and NECTIN3, respectively, in sequence. In contrast, in Group A tumors, LAMP3+ DCs were more distant from KRT19+ tumor cells, and NECTIN2 was also expressed on other cell surfaces (such as tumor cells). In Group A, the colocalization of KRT19 with NECTIN3 was insignificant, aligning with our single-cell analysis results. The low expression level of NECTIN3 in non-progressive PTC tumor cells suggested that these tumor cells struggled to retain DCs in the TME through adhesive interaction mediated by NECTIN3-NECTIN2 (figure 7H). "

 Higher M+2+6-percentage remained statistically significant for poor OS in a multivariate Cox PH model adjusted for clinically relevant DLBCL clinicopathologic parameters of IPI Risk Group and MYC fluorescence in situ hybridization(FISH) status (Table  1; Supplementary Table  S5)."

实体类型: 空间层级表型. PMID: 38956900.0, 文献标题: Identification of Hypoxia-ALCAMhigh Macrophage- Exhausted T Cell Axis in Tumor Microenvironment Remodeling for Immunotherapy Resistance, 期刊: Adv Sci, 研究年份: 2024. 物种: Human, 组织类型: Pancancer/Pancancer. 主要癌症类型: Others, 详细癌症类型: Pancancer. 主要空间层级: Cellular neighbourhoods, 具体空间结构名称: Tumor boundary with hypoxia-induced ALCAMhigh macrophages. 组成细胞类型: ALCAMhigh macrophages, Cancer cell. 表型类型: Biological phenotype, 主要表型: Immune Suppression, 具体表型: Immunosuppression. 发现技术: Spatial transcriptome.验证技术类型: Immunohistochemistry, Flow cytometry. 证据级别: protein. 核心证据描述: "The hypoxia status around the tumor boundary recruits ALCAMhigh macrophages. ...our analysis indicated a predominant infiltration of macrophages in the tumor boundary compared to both malignant and non-malignant regions in most ST slides. This result suggests that macrophage enriched in the tumor boundary is an important characteristic in TME among cancer types.
Further, the mIHC analysis showed that HIF1LNA significantly reduced HIF1 α expression, ALCAM expression, and the infiltration of macrophages and TIM3+ CD8+ T cells, and the combination treatment enhanced this efficacy"

实体类型: 空间层级表型. PMID: 38956900.0, 文献标题: Identification of Hypoxia-ALCAMhigh Macrophage- Exhausted T Cell Axis in Tumor Microenvironment Remodeling for Immunotherapy Resistance, 期刊: Adv Sci, 研究年份: 2024. 物种: Human, 组织类型: Pancancer/Pancancer. 主要癌症类型: Others, 详细癌症类型: Pancancer. 主要空间层级: Cell co-localization, 具体空间结构名称: Tex cells co-localized to ALCAMhigh macrophages. 组成细胞类型: Tex cells, ALCAMhigh macrophages. 表型类型: Biological phenotype, 主要表型: Immune Suppression, 具体表型: T cell exhaustion. 发现技术: Spatial transcriptome.验证技术类型: CellTrace labeling and dilution assay . 证据级别: cell . 核心证据描述: "Further, Tex cells co-localized to ALCAMhigh macrophages showed significantly higher exhaustion scores than those far away from ALCAMhigh macrophages (Figure 5g), suggesting that the colocalization of ALCAMhigh macrophages and Tex may be associated with the exhaustion of T cells
Next, we examined the proliferative ability of the T cells co-cultured with ALCAMhigh or ALCAMlow macrophages using the CellTrace labelling and dilution assay and found that T cells co-cultured with ALCAMhigh macrophages proliferated much less than with ALCAMlow macrophages (Figure 6h,i)"

实体类型: 空间层级表型. PMID: 38956900.0, 文献标题: Identification of Hypoxia-ALCAMhigh Macrophage-Exhausted T Cell Axis in Tumor Microenvironment Remodeling for Immunotherapy Resistance, 期刊: Advanced Science, 研究年份: 2023. 物种: human, 组织类型: Pancancer/Pancancer. 主要癌症类型: Others, 详细癌症类型: Pancancer. 主要空间层级: Cell co-localization, 具体空间结构名称: ALCAMhigh macrophages co-localize with exhausted CD8+ T cells. 组成细胞类型: ALCAMhigh macrophages, exhausted CD8+ T cells. 表型类型: Clinical phenotype, 主要表型: Drug Response, 具体表型: immunotherapy resistance. 发现技术: spatial transcriptomic.验证技术类型: co-culture, mouse model. 证据级别: mouse. 核心证据描述: "We found that a high proportion of spots with Tex infiltration are co-localized with ALCAMhigh macrophages (Figure 5e,f; Figure S8d,e, Sup porting Information).
Tex co-localized to ALCAMhigh macrophages showed significantly higher exhaustion scores than
those far away from ALCAMhigh macrophages (Figure 5g), Tex showed high cell interaction with hypoxiahigh macrophages or ALCAMhigh macrophages but not hypoxialow macrophages or ALCAMlow macrophages (Figure 5h,i; Figure S8f, Supporting Information), suggesting that the colocalization of ALCAMhigh macrophages and Tex may be associated with the exhaustion of T cells
Cell-to-cell interaction analysis showed strong interaction among hypoxiahigh or ALCAMhigh macrophages, Tex cells, and malignant cells (Figure 5h,i; Figure S8g, Supporting Information).
To verify the function of ALCAMhigh macrophages, we isolated ALCAMhigh and ALCAMlow macrophages from human and mouse tumor tissues and then co-cultured them with CD8 T-cells. We found that compared to ALCAMlow macrophages, ALCAMhigh macrophages increased the expression of CD8 T-cell exhaustion genes PD-1 and Lag3 (Figure 6f,g; Figure S9a,b, Supporting Information).
Taken together, the combination of HIF1 LNA and ICB demonstrated significant reduction in ALCAMhigh macrophages and exhaustion CD8+ T cells, and improvement in tumor burden, survival rate, and cytolytic activity. "

实体类型: 空间层级表型. PMID: 34301764.0, 文献标题: Neuroblastoma Formation Requires Unconventional CD4 T Cells and Arginase-1–Dependent Myeloid Cells, 期刊: Tumor biology and immunology, 研究年份: 2021. 物种: human, 组织类型: Pancancer/Pancancer. 主要癌症类型: Others, 详细癌症类型: Pancancer. 主要空间层级: Cell co-localization, 具体空间结构名称: interactions between pathogenic CD4+ T cells and Arg1-positive myeloid cells. 组成细胞类型: pathogenic CD4+ T cells，Arg1-positive myeloid cells. 表型类型: Biological phenotype, 主要表型: Tumor Growth, 具体表型: Tumor growth. 发现技术: IHC.验证技术类型: Mouse model, Flow cytometry. 证据级别: protein, mouse. 核心证据描述: "these results demonstrate how arginine-metabolizing myeloid cells conspire with pathogenic CD4+ T cells to create permissive conditions for tumor formation, suggesting that these protumorigenic pathways could be disabled by targeting myeloid arginine metabolism.
Similarly, IHC analysis of human neuroblastoma revealed Arg1 expression only in interspersed myeloid-like cells that overlapped partly with CD68 and CD163 staining (Supplementary Fig. 5C).
Our data thus far demonstrated spatial relationships between resident CCR2-dependent myeloid cells and non–antigen-specific CD4+ cells, and that both populations were required for tumor formation.
Compared to cells in nutritionally complete conditions, arginine-starved CD4+ cells exhibited increased expression of a suite of mRNAs encoding proteins associated with regulatory activity, including PD-L1, CD30L (Tnfsf8), RANKL (Tnfsf11), TROY (Tnfrsf19), and IL2, in addition to Foxp3 (Fig. 5F). "

实体类型: 空间层级表型. PMID: 38744958.0, 文献标题: Systematic dissection of tumor-normal single-cell ecosystems across a thousand tumors of 30 cancer types, 期刊: nature communications, 研究年份: 2024. 物种: human, 组织类型: Pancancer/Pancancer. 主要癌症类型: Others, 详细癌症类型: Pancancer. 主要空间层级: Spatial niche, 具体空间结构名称: Interferon-Enriched Community. 组成细胞类型: XCL9+ macrophages, LAMP3+ DCs, mesenchymal-derived interferon states. 表型类型: Biological phenotype, 主要表型: Drug Response, 具体表型: Responsive (favorable immunotherapy response). 发现技术: Spatial transcriptomics.验证技术类型: RNA smFISH. 证据级别: Protein. 核心证据描述: "Remarkably, one tumor ecosystem was distinctly occupied by interferon states from various cell types within the tumor (interferon-enriched community; Fig. 5A).
Interestingly, the vicinity of LAMP3+ DC with other immune cell states included in the interferon-enriched community (DC1, pDC, Langerhans cell, and Tfh) was identified in the adjacent normal network (Fig. 5C), implying that distinct configurations of cellular ecosystems even exist within the adjacent normal tissues compared to healthy normal tissues.
Among the cell states favorable for immunotherapy, we confirmed the presence of interferon-expressing mesenchymal cells (CXCL10 and PDGFRA) in the HNSC tissue sample using RNA smFISH (Supplementary Fig. S16).
Diverse components of the interferon-enriched community including LAMP3+ DC, CCL19+ fibroblast, CXCL9+ macrophage, and mesenchymal-derived interferon states confer favorable responses to immunotherapy and form different ecosystems between tumor, adjacent normal, and healthy normal tissues. "
